5.  Çikolata eriyene kadar bekletin.
6.  Çikolata eridikten sonra oda ısısına gelinceye kadar bekletin.
7.  Sıcak suyun içine rom ve tarçın ekleyip karıştırın.
8.  Ayrı bir kasede yumurta sarılarını çırpma teli ile çırpın.
9.  Yumurta sarısı ve tarçınlı karışımı çikolataya ekleyerek çırpın.
10.  Kremayı ekleyip karıştırın.
11.  Karışımı servis kuplarına paylaştırın.
12.  Bir gece buzdolabında bekletin.
13.  Üzerine süsleyip servis yapın.

white-chocolate-and-hazelnut-biscuit-lez.name: White Chocolate And Hazelnut Biscuit
instructions: 1. Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
2.  Un, toz fındık, şeker ve tereyağını bir kapta iyice yoğurun.
3.  Streç filme sararak 30 dakika buzdolabında soğutun.
4.  Hamuru unlanmış zeminde merdane ile 5 mm kalınlığında açın ve kurabiye kalıbı ile kesin.
5.  Yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye dizin.
6.  Hafif kızarıncaya kadar yaklaşık 10-12 dakika pişirin.
7.  Soğumaya bırakın.
8.  Çikolatayı benmari usulü eritip 10 dakika bekletin.
9.  Çikolatayı yağlı kağıttan yapılmış külah içine doldurun ve soğuyan bisküvilerin üzerine çizgiler şeklinde sıkın.
10.  Izgara teli üzerinde çikolata donuncaya kadar beklettikten sonra servis yapın.

white-chocolate-and-lemon-mousse-telecul.name: White Chocolate And Lemon Mousse
white-chocolate-and-lemon-mousse-telecul.original_name: Mousse de chocolate branco e limão
instructions: Pré-aqueça o forno a 180ºC. Prepare o crumble: esmague as bolachas com um rolo de cozinha ou triture-as numa picadora. Misture-lhes a manteiga derretida, as cascas de limão e o sal e espalhe num tabuleiro de forno, forrado com papel vegetal. Leve ao forno até a mistura ficar dourada. Retire e deixe arrefecer.

Prepare a mousse: parta o chocolate para uma tigela, junte 100 ml das natas e leve a derreter em banho-maria. Reserve. Bata as claras em castelo e envolva com o preparado de chocolate e natas. À parte, bata as restantes natas até ficarem firmes e incorpore-as no preparado anterior. Divida a mousse por copos ou taças individuais e leve ao frio durante, pelo menos, 1 hora.

Prepare o curd: leve ao lume uma tigela em banho-maria, deite nela o açúcar, o sumo e as cascas dos citrinos, as gemas e o ovo. Bata bem e deixe cozer até obter um creme espesso. Adicione depois a manteiga, pouco a pouco. Retire do lume, rejeite as cascas e deixe arrefecer, até ficar à temperatura ambiente.
Na hora de servir, deite um pouco de curd na superfície da mousse, decore com o crumble e sirva de seguida.

white-chocolate-and-oatmeal-sable-lezzet.name: White Chocolate And Oatmeal Sable
white-chocolate-and-oatmeal-sable-lezzet.original_name: Beyaz Çikolatalı Ve Yulaf Ezmeli Sable
instructions: 1. Yemek tarifleri arasında çayın yanına yakışan şık bir tarif.
2.  Yumuşatılmış tereyağı, pudra şeker ve vanilyayı mikserle krema kıvamına gelinceye kadar çırpın.
3.  Un, yulaf ezmesi ve kabartma tozunu ekleyip karıştırın.
4.  Beyaz ve sütlü çikolataları rendeleyip ekleyin.
5.  Hamuru yoğurup rulo şekline getirin ve streç folyoya sıkıca sarıp en az 30 dakika buzdolabında bekletin.
6.  Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
7.  Hamuru buzdolabından çıkartıp 6 mm kalınlığında dilimleyin.
8.  Yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye dizin ve önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 15-20 dakika pişirin.
9.  Izgara teli üzerinde soğumaya bırakın.
10.  Bitter çikolatayı küçük parçalara bölüp cam kaseye alın.
11.  İçi sıcak su dolu bir  tencerenin üzerine yerleştirerek çikolata eriyinceye kadar bekletin.
12.  Yağlı kağıttan külah hazırlayıp çikolatayı içine doldurun ve bisküvilerin üzerine ince çizgiler yapın.
13.  Çikolata donduktan sonra servis yapın.

white-chocolate-and-raspberry-cake-lezze.name: White Chocolate And Raspberry Cake
instructions: 1. Yumurta, vanilya ve şekeri geniş bir kapta mikserle çırpın.
2.  Yağ ve sütü ekleyin.
3.  Un, kakao, kabartma tozunu ilave ederek karıştırın ve yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye hamuru yayın.
4. 160 dereceye ayarlanmış fırında 20-25 dakika pişirin.
5.  Yumurta sarısı, süt, şeker, vanilya ve unu tencerede karıştırın ve orta ateşte koyulaşıncaya kadar pişirin.
6.  Beyaz çikolatayı ekleyip eriyinceye kadar karıştırmaya devam edin.
7.  Ocaktan alıp labne peyniri ve kremayı ilave edin ve mikserle ılınıncaya kadar çırpın.
8.  Keki ortadan ikiye kesin.
9.  Arasına kremanın 2/3’ünü yayıp üzerine frambuazları dizip kapatın.
10.  Kalan kremayı üzerine sıvayın.
11.  Çikolata sos ile üzerine çizgiler yapın.
12.  Üzerini nane yaprakları ile süsleyerek servis yapın.
13.  Klasik frambuazlı pasta tarifine göz atmayı unutmayın.

white-chocolate-and-raspberry-ice-cream.name: White Chocolate And Raspberry Ice Cream
instructions: Heat milk, sugar, vanilla bean and seeds, and salt in a saucepan over medium heat until warm, about 5 minutes.

Whisk egg yolks and about 1 cup warm milk mixture in a bowl; stir egg mixture into a saucepan. Continue to cook and stir until custard thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon, 5 to 7 minutes. Remove vanilla bean.
Stir white chocolate chips into custard until melted. Pour custard into a large bowl; stir in heavy cream and vanilla extract. Cover and refrigerate until chilled.

Pour chilled mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's directions until it reaches 'soft-serve' consistency. Place ice cream in the freezer while you cook raspberries.
Heat raspberries in a saucepan over medium heat until raspberries begin to fall apart, 7 to 10 minutes. Press raspberries through a sieve over a bowl to remove seeds; discard seeds.

Gently swirl raspberries into soft ice cream, creating ribbons of raspberries. Transfer ice cream to a 1- or 2-quart lidded plastic container; cover surface with plastic wrap and seal. For best results, ice cream should ripen in the freezer for at least 2 hours or overnight.

white-chocolate-and-tangerine-mousse-tel.name: White Chocolate And Tangerine Mousse
white-chocolate-and-tangerine-mousse-tel.original_name: Mousse de chocolate branco e tangerina

ingredients.item: Raspas de chocolate branco para decorar

instructions: Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria. Parta o chocolate em pedaços e derreta-os em banho-maria. Reserve.
Coloque num tacho o leite e a raspa das tangerinas e leve ao lume até ferver. Retire do lume e adicione as folhas de gelatina escorridas, mexendo até se dissolverem.
Passe o preparado anterior por um passador de rede, deite sobre o chocolate branco derretido, mexa e deixe arrefecer. À parte, bata as natas em chantili não muito firme.

Envolva cuidadosamente o creme de chocolate com o chantili. Deite em tacinhas e leve ao frigorífico durante, pelo menos, 3 horas. Decore com os gomos das tangerinas e com raspas de chocolate branco e sirva.

white-chocolate-and-wax-worm-cookies.name: White Chocolate And Wax Worm Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C.
In a small bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the butter, brown and granulated sugars, and vanilla extract until creamy.
Stir the egg into the butter mixture, then gradually beat in the flour mixture. Stir in the white chocolate chunks and half of the wax worms, reserving the rest for garnishing the cookies.
Drop the batter by rounded teaspoonful onto nonstick baking sheets.
Gently press 2 or 3 of the remaining wax worms into the top of each cookie.
Bake until the edges of each cookie are lightly browned, 8 to 12 minutes.
Let cookies cool on the baking sheets for 2 minutes, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely.

white-chocolate-biscuit-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Biscuit
instructions: 1. Yağlı kağıdı fırın tepsisine yayın.
2.  Margarin, un, şekerli vanilin ve pudra şekerini bir kaba alıp yoğurun.
3.  Hamuru merdane ile yarım cm inceliğinde açın.
4.  Kurabiye kalıpları ile şekil vererek kesin ve fırın tepsisine yan yana dizin.
5.  Önceden ısıtılmış 160 derece fırında 15 dakika pişirin.
6.  Beyaz çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin.
7.  Bisküviler soğuyunca üzerine dökün.
8.  Üzerini renkli süsleme şekerleriyle süsleyip çikolata donana kadar bekletin.
9.  Renkli süsleme şekerleriyle süsleyip servis yapın.

white-chocolate-bread-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Bread

ingredients.item: ¾ su bardağı iri çekilmiş ceviz

instructions: 1. Unu derin bir kaba aktarın.
2.  150 gr beyaz çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin.
3.  100 gr beyaz çikolatayı küçük parçalara ayırın.
4.  Tüm malzemeleri una ekleyip iyice yoğurun.
5.  Üzerini nemli bir bez örterek 1 saat mayalandırın.
6.  Uzun oval şekil verdikten sonra yağlı kağıt serdiğiniz tepsiye yerleştirin.
7.  30 dakika daha dinlendirdikten sonra önceden ısıtılmış 160 dereceye ayarlı fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
8.  Dilimleyip servis yapın.

white-chocolate-bread-pudding.name: White Chocolate Bread Pudding
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Place French bread in a large bowl. Pour heavy cream over bread and let soak. Add sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract; mix all together with your hands. Add white chocolate chips and mix thoroughly.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbly, 40 to 45 minutes.

While bread pudding is baking, prepare the sauce. Combine white chocolate chips and heavy cream in a small saucepan over low heat. Cook, stirring constantly, until melted. Drizzle a small amount of sauce over each serving.

white-chocolate-brownies-with-toasted-se.name: White Chocolate Brownies With Toasted Sesame Caramel

ingredients.item: . each black and white sesame seeds

instructions: Adjust an oven rack to the middle of the oven. Preheat the oven to 177°C. Grease a 9 by 13 inch baking pan and line with a parchment sling.
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, granulated and brown sugars, oil, and vanilla.

Place the chocolate and butter in a small, heavy-bottom saucepan set over low heat and melt together, stirring frequently to prevent the chocolate from scorching. Continue cooking until the mixture is smooth.
Add the white chocolate mixture to the sugar-egg mixture and whisk until smooth. Add the flour mixture and stir with a spatula until just combined.

Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 28 to 32 minutes, until the sides of the brownies have set, the top is starting to crackle and look glossy, and a wooden skewer or toothpick inserted into the center comes out with crumbs. The batter on the toothpick should not be wet but should have a good amount of crumbs clinging to it.
Transfer the pan to a wire rack and let cool completely. Use the parchment sling to gently lift the brownies from the pan.

In a large, heavy-bottom saucepan (the caramel will bubble up quite a bit once it starts cooking, so it’s important to have a pan that is deep), combine the granulated sugar, water, corn syrup, and salt, stirring very gently to combine while trying to avoid getting any sugar crystals on the sides of the pan. Cover the pot, and bring to a boil over medium-high heat, until the sugar has melted and the mixture is clear, 3 to 5 minutes. Uncover, and then cook until the sugar has turned a pale golden color, 4 to 5 minutes more, and registers about 149°C on a candy thermometer. Turn the heat down slightly, and cook for a few minutes more until the sugar is golden and registers 177°C. Remove the pot immediately from the heat and add the heavy cream. The cream will foam considerably, so be careful pouring it in. Add the butter next, followed by the vanilla and toasted sesame oil, and stir to combine. Set aside to cool for 5 to 10 minutes.

Pour the caramel over the cooled brownies, using an offset spatula to smooth it evenly. Sprinkle the sesame seeds over the caramel, and then refrigerate, uncovered, for 2 hours. When ready to serve, cut into bars. Serve at room temperature. Brownies can be stored in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.

white-chocolate-butterscotch-cookies.name: White Chocolate Butterscotch Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C
Mix sugars, butter, egg, and vanilla extract in a medium bowl.
Stir in flour, baking powder, salt, white chocolate and butterscotch until dough.
Scoop onto a greased baking sheet and place in the oven for 10 to 12 minutes.
Let cool for 10 minutes.
Enjoy!

white-chocolate-cake-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Cake
instructions: 1. Yumurtalar ve toz şekeri geniş bir karıştırma kabına alın.
2.  Şeker tamamen eriyip köpük gibi oluncaya kadar bir mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
3.  Un, kabartma tozu, vanilya ve tarçını ayrı bir karıştırma kabına eleyip harmanlayın.
4.  Yumurtalı karışıma yoğurt, Ayçiçek yağı ve harmanladığınız kuru malzemeleri ekleyin.
5.  Tüm malzeme iyice özdeşleşinceye kadar çırpın.
6.  Damla çikolatayı ilave edip karıştırın ve hamuru yağlayıp unladığınız kek kalıbına dökün.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 40-45  dakika pişirin.
8.  Çikolata sosu için, kremayı bir sos tenceresinde ısıtın.
9.  Küçük parçalara böldüğünüz çikolatayı ekleyin ve ocaktan alın.
10.  Çikolata tamamen eriyene kadar karıştırın.
11.  Çikolata sosunu servis tabağına aldığınız kekin üzerine gezdirip servis yapın.

white-chocolate-cake-recipe-comedera.name: White Chocolate Cake Recipe
white-chocolate-cake-recipe-comedera.original_name: Torta de chocolate blanco receta casera
instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180 ºC.
Bate la mantequilla con el azúcar hasta lograr una crema suave.
Agrega en hilo un poco de esencia de vainilla y vuelve a mezclar.
Derrite el chocolate blanco (de la mezcla) a baño María o en el microondas hasta que esté completamente líquido.
Agrega los huevos junto con la leche y bate hasta volver a tener una mezcla uniforme.
Añade la harina y el polvo de hornear previamente tamizados los colocamos en el bol con lo demás y batimos.
Vacía la masa en un molde, previamente engrasado con mantequilla y harina, y cocina en el horno a 165ºC por media hora o hasta que este dorado.
Deja enfriar la torta de chocolate blanco sobre una rejilla. Cuando este a temperatura ambiente puedes decorarla.
Derrite el chocolate de la cobertura.
Baña la torta con el chocolate derretido y decora con trozos gruesos de otros tipos de chocolate.

white-chocolate-cheesecake-recipe-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Cheesecake Recipe

ingredients.item: Glutensiz bisküvi veya bademli kurabiye glutensiz versiyon için
Yulaf ezmesi + biraz bal veya hindistan cevizi yağı daha hafif ve sağlıklı taban
Tam buğdaylı bisküvi daha lifli bir seçenek
Hindistan cevizi yağı daha hafif ve tropikal aroma
Margarin veya az tuzlu tereyağı pratik alternatif
Bitter çikolata daha yoğun aromalı ve tatlıyı hafifletir
Beyaz çikolata + biraz sütlü çikolata karışımı → dengeli tat
Vegan beyaz çikolata süt ürünü kullanmak istemeyenler için
Labne peyniri daha yoğun kıvam ve hafif ekşimsi tat
Mascarpone daha kremamsı ve zengin tat
Vegan krem peyniri süt ürünü istemeyenler için
Laktozsuz krema, soya kreması veya hindistan cevizi kreması → hafif ve vegan alternatifler
Stevia, eritritol veya agave şurubu düşük kalorili tatlandırıcı
Bal veya akçaağaç şurubu doğal ve hafif aroma
Vanilya tozu veya taze rendelenmiş vanilya çubuğu daha doğal aroma
Portakal kabuğu rendesi hafif turunç aroması

instructions: 1. Bisküvileri rondodan geçirip ince kırıntı haline getirin.
2. Eritilmiş tereyağı ile karıştırıp kelepçeli bir kek kalıbına bastırarak taban oluşturun.
3.  10 dakika buzdolabında bekletin.
4. Beyaz çikolatayı benmari usulü veya mikrodalgada eritin.
5. Krem peynir ve şekeri mikserle pürüzsüz olana kadar çırpın.
6. Eritilmiş beyaz çikolatayı ve vanilyayı ekleyip karıştırın.
7. Yumurtaları tek tek ekleyerek karışımı homojen hale getirin.
8. Kremayı ekleyip hafifçe karıştırın.
9. Dolguyu bisküvi tabanının üzerine dökün.
10. Önceden ısıtılmış 160 derece fırında yaklaşık 45–50 dakika pişirin.
11. Fırından çıkardıktan sonra oda sıcaklığına gelene kadar soğutun, ardından buzdolabında 3–4 saat veya tercihen bir gece bekletin.
12. Üzerini meyveler veya rendelenmiş beyaz çikolata ile süsleyerek dilimleyin ve servis edin.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

white-chocolate-cheesecake-with-white-ch.name: White Chocolate Cheesecake With White Chocolate Brandy Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Wrap the outside of a 10-inch springform pan with foil. Grease the inside of the pan.
Place the cream cheese, sugar, and flour in a mixing bowl and cream until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Scrape bowl.

Melt 4 ounces of the white chocolate. With an electric mixer on low speed, mix melted white chocolate into cream cheese mixture. Keeping electric mixer on low, slowly beat in the vanilla and 1/2 cup of heavy cream. Blend well. Pour mixture into the prepared springform pan.

Place cheesecake pan in a water bath filled with warm water. Bake at 149°C (150 degrees C) for 50 to 60 minutes, or until center of the cheesecake is just firm. Cool at room temperature for 1 hour. Refrigerate until set before removing from pan.

To make White Chocolate Brandy Sauce: place chopped white chocolate in a heat-proof bowl. Pour 1 cup cream into a saucepan and bring it to a boil over medium-high heat. Watch carefully so it doesn't boil over. Pour hot cream over chopped white chocolate; let soften for 2 minutes. Stir with a wooden spoon until melted. Add brandy and continue stirring until incorporated. Pour over chilled cheesecake and serve.

white-chocolate-chestnut-souffle-recipe-.name: White Chocolate Chestnut Soufflé Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 yemek kaşığı toz şeker (yumurta sarıları için)
2 yemek kaşığı toz şeker (yumurta beyazları için)
30 gr tereyağı + sufle kaplarını yağlamak için biraz ekstra
Beyaz çikolatayı badem veya fındık parçacıklarıyla zenginleştirebilirsiniz.
Fındık kreması, badem ezmesi veya dulce de leche ile farklı bir aroma yaratabilirsiniz.
Hazır kestane püresi yerine haşlanmış ve ezilmiş kestane de kullanılabilir.
Margarin veya hafif bir bitkisel yağ ile değiştirilebilir, ancak tereyağı tadı suflenin lezzetini artırır.
Süt yerine badem sütü, soya sütü veya kremamsı bir dokusu için yarım yağlı süt + krema karışımı kullanılabilir.
Normal un yerine badem unu veya glutensiz un karışımı kullanılabilir.
Yumurtayı değiştirmek zordur, ama yumurta yerine vegan tariflerde aquafaba (nohut suyu) ile beyaz kısmı hazırlamak mümkün.
Beyaz şeker yerine toz esmer şeker veya hindistancevizi şekeri ile farklı tatlar elde edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Sütü küçük bir sos tenceresinde hafifçe ısıtın, kaynamamasına dikkat edin.
2. Yumurta sarılarını 20 gram şeker ile köpük köpük olana kadar çırpın, ardından unu ekleyip karıştırın.
3. Ilık sütü yavaş yavaş yumurtalı karışıma ekleyin ve sürekli çırpın; aksi takdirde yumurtalar pişip topaklanabilir.
4. Karışımı, içine yaklaşık iki parmak su koyduğunuz bir tencerenin üzerine oturttuğunuz kaseye aktarın ve benmari yöntemiyle pişirin.
5.  Muhallebi kıvamına gelen karışımı ocaktan alın, içine küçük parçalar halinde beyaz çikolatayı ve tereyağını ekleyin.
6.  Malzemeler tamamen eriyip karışana kadar karıştırın.
7. Ardından kestane püresini ekleyip homojen bir kıvam alana kadar karıştırmaya devam edin.
8. Ayrı bir kapta yumurta beyazlarını 25 gram şekerle birlikte sert tepecikler oluşana kadar çırpın.
9. Kestaneli karışımı yumurta beyazlarına spatula yardımıyla nazikçe katlayın, böylece karışımın havası korunur ve kabarık bir yapı elde edilir.
10. Sufle kaplarını tereyağı ile yağlayın, üzerine bir miktar şeker serpin ve fazla şekeri silkeleyin.
11.  Hazırladığınız harcı kaplara eşit şekilde paylaştırın.
12. Önceden ısıtılmış 200°C fırında 8-10 dakika pişirin ve sıcak olarak servis edin.

white-chocolate-chunk-raspberry-jam-cake.name: White Chocolate Chunk & Raspberry Jam Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180ºC.
For the cake, set aside three separate bowls and do the following:
Bowl 1: Add butter, oil and sugar, whip until it becomes a creamy mixture.
Bowl 2: Mix the eggs, milk, vanilla and raspberry jam. Add slowly to the previous bowl.
Bowl 3: Mix all the dry ingredients and add to Bowl 1.
Now, grease your mold, pour the mixture in and bake for 20 minutes .
For the cream: Mix the cream and the vanilla beans, whip until it reaches a soft peak.
Cool the cake and top with cream. Once decorated, serve and enjoy!

white-chocolate-cookies-teleculinaria.name: White Chocolate Cookies
instructions: Ligue o forno a 200.C. Pré-aquecer o forno a 200ºC.
Numa tigela, bata a manteiga e o açúcar até se obter um creme bem fofo. Sem parar de bater, incorpore o ovo, e bata vigorosamente, até obter um creme bem homogéneo. Reserve.
À parte, pique o chocolate em pedaços com uma faca, mas não muito pequenos para não se desfazerem. Reserve.
Peneire a farinha com o fermento para a tigela com a mistura da manteiga, o açúcar e o ovo, para que fique bem solta. Por fim, junte o chocolate branco e envolva.
Num tabuleiro forrado com papel vegetal, disponha colheradas da massa, deixando espaço entre elas porque as bolachas crescem.
Leve ao forno até que os rebordos das bolachas fiquem dourados. Retire no forno e deixe as bolachas arrefecer sobre uma grelha.

white-chocolate-cranberry-oatmeal-cookie.name: White Chocolate Cranberry Oatmeal Cookies
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, cardamom, and salt. Set aside.

In a stand mixer (or using a hand mixer), beat the butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until light and creamy, 6-8 minutes, stopping to scrape down the sides as needed. Add the egg and vanilla, and beat until fully incorporated.
Gradually mix in the dry ingredients until just combined. Fold in the oats, ½ cup of the cranberries, and the chopped white chocolate.
Refrigerate the dough for at least 30 minutes (or up to 3 hours) to firm up.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C), and line two large baking sheets with parchment paper.
Scoop out ⅓-cup-sized portions of dough, and roll them into balls. Place 4 on each baking sheet, leaving some space in between each.

Bake in the preheated oven for 13 minutes, then gently press down the cookies, and top with the remaining cranberries and white chocolate chips. Bake for about 3 minutes, or until the edges are golden but the center is still soft.
Let the cookies cool on the baking sheets for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Optional: Drizzle some melted white chocolate over the top once the cookies have cooled for a gourmet touch.
Enjoy!

white-chocolate-espresso-torte-with-haze.name: White Chocolate Espresso Torte With Hazelnut Praline

ingredients.prep: 1 to 1 1/2 inches thick; for chocolate curls

instructions: Place sheet of foil on work surface. Bring sugar and 1/4 cup water to boil in heavy medium saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Boil without stirring until syrup is deep amber, brushing down sides of pan with wet pastry brush and swirling occasionally, 7 to 8 minutes. Mix in espresso powder, then nuts. Scrape mixture onto foil; quickly spread out. Cool completely. Chop praline into small pieces.

Microwave white chocolate block at 50 percent power in 10-second intervals until chocolate feels just slightly warm and is just beginning to soften (if too soft, let stand until firm enough to shave). Using vegetable peeler, shave 1- to 1 1/2-inch-wide ribbon, about 4 to 5 inches long, from block. Gently roll ribbon into loose curl (cylinder). Repeat, making 20 to 24 curls. DO AHEAD Praline and chocolate curls can be made 2 days ahead. Chill separately in airtight containers.

Stir chocolate and 5 tablespoons water in metal bowl set over saucepan of barely simmering water until chocolate is smooth. Remove bowl from over water. Cool chocolate to lukewarm, stirring occasionally. Using electric mixer, beat cream in large bowl until soft peaks form. Gradually pour lukewarm chocolate over cream, folding to blend well. Transfer 2 1/2 cups mousse to another medium bowl; gently fold in espresso powder. Cover and chill both bowls of mousse until firm, at least 6 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Stir liqueur and espresso powder in small bowl until espresso dissolves. Place chocolate and corn syrup in medium bowl. Bring cream to boil in small saucepan; pour over chocolate and corn syrup. Stir until melted and smooth. DO AHEAD Soaking syrup and ganache can be made 1 day ahead. Cover separately and store at room temperature.
Preheat oven to 177°C. Coat 15x10-inch sheet of parchment paper with nonstick spray. Line 15x10x1-inch baking sheet with prepared parchment (sides of baking sheet should not be coated).

Combine eggs, sugar, 2 teaspoons espresso powder, vanilla, and salt in large bowl. Using electric mixer, beat until egg mixture is thick and fluffy and falls in ribbons when beater is lifted, 6 to 7 minutes. Sift flour over in 3 additions, folding gently just to incorporate after each addition. Transfer 1 cup batter to small bowl; fold in butter. Fold batter from small bowl back into batter in large bowl just until combined; spread evenly on baking sheet.
Bake cake until tester inserted into center comes out clean and cake begins to pull away from pan, about 18 minutes. Cool cake in pan on rack 30 minutes.

Sift 2 tablespoons powdered sugar over cake. Cut around pan sides. Slide spatula under parchment to loosen from pan and invert cake onto work surface. Peel off parchment. Cut cake crosswise into 4 rectangles, each about 10x3 1/2 inches.

Place 1 cake rectangle on platter. Brush 2 tablespoons soaking syrup over. Spread 3 tablespoons ganache over, then 1/3 of espresso mousse (about 3/4 cup). Repeat 2 more times with cake, syrup, ganache, and mousse. Top with fourth cake layer; press lightly to adhere. Spread 2/3 cup plain mousse thinly over top and sides of torte to seal, then spread remaining mousse over top and sides. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Tent loosely with foil and chill.

Before serving, press praline pieces into mousse on all sides of torte. Mound white chocolate curls on top. Mix 4 tablespoons powdered sugar and 1 1/2 teaspoons espresso powder in small bowl. Sift over top of torte.

white-chocolate-flan.name: White Chocolate Flan
instructions: Combine white and brown sugar and water in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Stir occasionally to dissolve the sugar completely, but stop stirring once the mixture comes to a boil to prevent the sugar from crystallizing.

Swirl the pan gently to redistribute the caramel as the sugar begins to darken. Cook to about 154°C (160 degrees C), or until the sugar turns light golden brown. Remove from heat immediately, as sugar will continue to darken.
Pour the caramel in an 8-inch baking dish, coating the bottom and sides of the dish. Let caramel harden, about 5 minutes.
Preheat an oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Melt the white chocolate in a microwave-safe glass or ceramic bowl in 30-second intervals, stirring after each melting, for 1 to 3 minutes (depending on your microwave). Do not overheat or chocolate will scorch.
Cream together the cream cheese, mascarpone cheese, evaporated milk, sweetened condensed milk, eggs, and melted white chocolate in a bowl until smooth.
Pour the cream cheese mixture over the hardened caramel.
Place baking dish in a large roasting pan. Fill the roasting pan with about 1-inch water.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour.

Refrigerate until completely chilled, 5 to 6 hours. To serve, run a paring knife along the edges of the baking dish to loosen the flan. Cover the baking dish with a plate, and invert it to tip the flan out of the pan and onto the plate.

white-chocolate-flan-recipe-comedera.name: White Chocolate Flan Recipe
white-chocolate-flan-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta fácil de flan de chocolate blanco
instructions: Calienta un sartén e incorpora el azúcar y el agua. Mezcla y cocina a fuego medio - bajo hasta que se vaya derritiendo y formando el caramelo.
Cuando esté listo y color rubio intenso, esparce en el molde hasta que quede cubierto el fondo.
Precalienta el horno a 180° C.
Vierte en una olla la leche, el azúcar y la vainilla. Calienta a fuego medio y cocina hasta que el azúcar se disuelva y esté bien caliente.
Incorpora el chocolate blanco y derrite hasta que quede bien integrado. Cuando esté todo perfectamente mezclado, apaga y deja reposar.
En un bol, bate muy bien los huevos hasta que queden espumosos.
Mezcla la leche con chocolate junto a los huevos batidos.
Vierte la mezcla en el molde con caramelo y hornea a baño María por 45 minutos a 180° C.
Sabrás que estará listo cuando introduzcas un palillo y salga completamente limpio.
Cuando esté listo, deja reposar, desmolda y refrigera un rato.

white-chocolate-fondant-recipe-with-cher.name: White Chocolate Fondant Recipe With Cherry Sauce
white-chocolate-fondant-recipe-with-cher.original_name: Vişne Soslu Beyaz Çikolatalı Fondan Tarifi
instructions: 1. Beyaz çikolatayı ve tereyağını benmari usulü eritin ve karıştırarak pürüzsüz hale getirin.
2. Ayrı bir kapta yumurta ve şekeri köpük köpük olana kadar çırpın.
3. Eritilmiş çikolatalı karışımı yumurtalara ekleyip karıştırın.
4. Un ve vanilini ekleyip homojen bir kıvam elde edin.
5. Karışımı yağlanmış küçük kalıplara paylaştırın.
6. Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 12-15 dakika pişirin (içi akışkan kalmalıdır).
7. Vişne, şeker ve suyu küçük bir tencerede kaynatın.
8. Nişastayı az suyla açıp karışıma ekleyin ve kıvam alana kadar pişirin.
9. Fırından çıkan fondanı 2-3 dakika dinlendirin ve kalıptan çıkarın.
10. Üzerine hazırladığınız vişne sosunu gezdirerek sıcak servis edin.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

white-chocolate-frosting-argiro.name: White Chocolate Frosting
instructions: Για το γλάσο λευκής σοκολάτας πρώτος τρόπος
Στο ξύλο κοπής με ένα μαχαίρι την ψιλοκόβουμε
Τη βάζουμε σε ένα πυρίμαχο και φαρδύ μπολ.
Καλύπτουμε το μπολ με μεμβράνη και τη λιώνουμε στα μικροκύματα για 1′ να λιώσει  χωρίς να χάσει το σχήμα της.
Για το γλάσο λευκής σοκολάτας δεύτερος τρόπος
Εναλλακτικά, τη λιώνουμε σε μπεν μαρί .
Ζεσταίνουμε σε μια κατσαρόλα με χοντρή βάση την κρέμα γάλακτος.
Μόλις αρχίσει να φουσκώνει (στους 90 βαθμούς C) την αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά.
Προσθέτουμε τα κομμάτια σε 3 δόσεις ανακατεύοντας κυκλικά με μια μαλακή σπάτουλα.
Ανακατεύουμε καλά μετά από κάθε δόση .
Θα δείτε πως μόλις βάλετε τις πρώτες 2 δόσεις της καυτής κρέμας το γλάσο αρχίζει να  σκληραίνει αλλά ρίχνοντας και την τελευταία δόση κρέμας γίνεται λείο και απαλό.
Φροντίζουμε όταν αναμιγνύουμε τα υλικά, να μην εγκλωβίζουμε αέρα μέσα στο μίγμα γιατί θα εμφανιστούν φουσκάλες στην επιφάνεια της.
Όσο είναι ζεστή, είναι μαλακή και ρευστή.
Βάζουμε το γλυκό που θέλουμε να ντύσουμε πάνω σε σχάρα που ακουμπάει μέσα σε ταψί.
Το γλυκό πρέπει να είναι κρύο.
Σιγά σιγά περιχύνουμε το γλυκό με το γλάσο, στο κέντρο του, και αρχίζει να τρέχει στα πλάγια, να γίνετε σκληρό και έτσι καλύπτει και ντύνει όλο το γλυκό ολόγυρα.
Αφού την ετοιμάσουμε και είναι ακόμα ρευστή, ντύνουμε ένα ρηχό ταψί με μεμβράνη.
Αδειάζουμε μέσα την ρευστή χλιαρή ακόμα γκανάς.
Την απλώνουμε σε όλη την επιφάνεια του ταψιού. Καλύπτουμε με μεμβράνη που εφάπτεται σε όλη την επιφάνεια. Αφήνουμε να κρυώσει τελείως.
Παγώνουμε την γκανάς στο ψυγείο για 1 ώρα να σταθεροποιηθεί.

Όταν την χρειαστούμε, την αδειάζουμε παγωμένη όπως είναι μέσα στον κάδο του μίξερ. Με το σύρμα τη χτυπάμε να αφρατέψει καλά και να γίνει σαν μους. Τότε διογκώνεται, αποκτάει περισσότερο όγκο με το χτύπημα και αφρατεύει σαν μους.
Μπορείς με αυτήν την μους να γεμίσεις μακαρόν , μπισκότα , τούρτα , κορμό .

white-chocolate-key-lime-cheesecake.name: White Chocolate Key Lime Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Lightly grease the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Sprinkle graham cracker crumbs into the bottom of the prepared pan.
Beat cream cheese and sugar with an electric mixer in a large bowl until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, allowing each egg to blend into the cream cheese mixture before adding the next.
Mix white chocolate chips, cream, lime juice, and lime zest together in a stainless steel bowl. Place bowl over a pot of boiling water.

Stir chocolate chips mixture until the chocolate melts completely and the mixture is smooth, about 5 minutes; pour into the cream cheese mixture and stir to combine. Pour the mixture over the graham cracker crumbs in the prepared springform pan.
Bake in preheated oven the cake's center is set, about 75 minutes. Cool at room temperature for 15 minutes before refrigerating to chill completely, at least 1 hour.

white-chocolate-lemon-japanese-cheesecak.name: White Chocolate Lemon Japanese Cheesecake
instructions: In a bowl, beat together egg whites, sugar, 1 tbsp lemon juice, and cornstarch until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, mix together cream cheese, sour cream, 1 tbsp lemon juice, lemon Jello, and flour. Combine thoroughly.
Combine the contents of both bowls and mix well. Add batter to a greased, springform pan and place in a water bath.
Bake at 177°C for 1 hr 15 min, then let cool for an hour. While cooling, make glaze by melting white chocolate in a bowl and mixing with lemon juice and milk until smooth.
Top cooled cake with glaze and refrigerate for 3 hours.
Serve.

white-chocolate-macadamia-cranberry-drea.name: White Chocolate Macadamia Cranberry Dreams
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda and salt; set aside. Cream together white sugar, light brown sugar and butter (do not use shortening). Stir in slightly beaten eggs and vanilla.
Add flour mixture until just mixed. Stir in vanilla chips, macadamia nuts and dried cranberries.

Drop dough on an ungreased cookie sheet by small scoop or rounded teaspoon. Bake in preheated oven until cookies are just set, about 10 minutes. Remove from oven and let cool. Cookies will sink slightly.

Variations: To make chocolate cookies, omit 1/2 cup flour and replace with 1/2 cup cocoa. To make refrigerator cookies: Roll dough into 2 rolls, wrap with plastic wrap and chill or freeze. (If you freeze the dough, thaw for at least 1/2 hour before cutting). Slice 1-inch slices; cut into 4 and place on baking sheet point up. For fancier cookies: Drizzle melted white chocolate on chocolate cookies and melted dark chocolate on the white cookie. Enjoy!

white-chocolate-mousse-teleculinaria.name: White Chocolate Mousse

ingredients.item: Chocolate negro e branco ralado para polvilhar

instructions: Parta o chocolate branco em pedaços e leve ao lume, em banho-maria, com a manteiga. Quando o chocolate estiver quase derretido, retire-o do lume e mexa até ficar homogéneo.
Adicione as gemas ao chocolate quente e mexa bem. Reserve. À parte, bata as claras em castelo com o açúcar e envolva no preparado anterior.
Deite a mousse numa taça grande e decore com raspas de chocolate negro e branco. Leve ao frigorífico até ao momento de servir.

white-chocolate-mousse-step-by-step-come.name: White Chocolate Mousse Step By Step
white-chocolate-mousse-step-by-step-come.original_name: Mousse de chocolate blanco casero paso a paso

ingredients.item: 200 ml de nata (fría de la nevera)
Fresas para decorar o chocolate rallado

instructions: Funde el chocolate en un horno microondas poco a poco hasta que quede una mezcla pareja. Deja templar-enfriar a temperatura ambiente. (También puedes hacerlo al baño de María, fundiendo el chocolate con un poco de la nata).
En un recipiente bien frío y con una batidora de varillas de mano, monta la nata con la cucharada de azúcar.
Añade el chocolate a la nata poco a poco, mezclando con ayuda de una espátula con suaves movimientos envolventes, hasta que consigas una mezcla homogénea.
Reparte la mezcla en los vasos destinados para su presentación, cúbrelos con papel film y ponlos a enfriar en la nevera por al menos 4 horas antes de servir.

white-chocolate-mousse-with-passion-frui.name: White Chocolate Mousse With Passion Fruit
white-chocolate-mousse-with-passion-frui.original_name: Mousse de chocolate branco com maracujá
instructions: Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria, durante alguns minutos. Parta o chocolate para uma tigela, junte o leite e a gelatina escorrida e leve ao lume em banho-maria.
Mexa bem até a gelatina ficar bem dissolvida e o chocolate derretido. Retire do lume e deixe arrefecer.
À parte, bata as natas em chantili e envolva-as com o preparado anterior. Distribua por taças individuais e leve ao frio até solidificar.
Na hora de servir, abra os maracujás ao meio, retire-lhes a polpa com uma colher e disponha nas taças, cobrindo a mousse. Decore com hortelã e sirva.
Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria, durante alguns minutos. Parta o chocolate para uma tigela, junte o leite e a gelatina escorrida e leve ao lume em banho-maria.
Mexa bem até a gelatina ficar bem dissolvida e o chocolate derretido. Retire do lume e deixe arrefecer.
À parte, bata as natas em chantili e envolva-as com o preparado anterior. Distribua por taças individuais e leve ao frio até solidificar.
Na hora de servir, abra os maracujás ao meio, retire-lhes a polpa com uma colher e disponha nas taças, cobrindo a mousse. Decore com hortelã e sirva.

white-chocolate-mousse-with-vanilla-argi.name: White Chocolate Mousse With Vanilla

ingredients.item: 250 γραμ. λευκή σοκολάτα κομμένη σε μικρά κομμάτια
3 ολόφρεσκα βιολογικά αυγά (χωριστά οι κρόκοι από τ’ ασπράδια)
250 γραμ. λευκή σοκολάτα κομμένη σε μικρά κομμάτια
3 ολόφρεσκα βιολογικά αυγά (χωριστά οι κρόκοι από τ’ ασπράδια)

instructions: Λώνουμε τη λευκή σοκολάτα με το γάλα σε μπεν μαρί κι ανακατεύουμε τακτικά. Μόλις η σοκολάτα λιώσει αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά και αφήνουμε το μείγμα να κρυώσει για 5΄-6΄.
Σχίζουμε το μπαστουνάκι της βανίλιας και με τη λάμα του μαχαιριού αφαιρούμε προσεκτικά τους σπόρους. Τους προσθέτουμε στη λιωμένη σοκολάτα και ανακατεύουμε καλά.
Έναν έναν ρίχνουμε στη λιωμένη σοκολάτα τους κρόκους χτυπώντας με το σύρμα.
Κάθε φορά που απορροφάται ο ένας, προσθέτουμε τον επόμενο.
Χτυπάμε την κρέμα γάλακτος σε παχύρρευστη μορφή και λίγη λίγη τη ρίχνουμε κι αυτή στο μείγμα.
Χτυπάμε τα ασπράδια με το μίξερ χειρός για 5΄-6΄, μέχρι να σχηματιστούν απαλές κορυφές.
Προσθέτουμε τη μισή μαρέγκα στη μους διπλώνοντας απαλά και αφού την απορροφήσει ρίχνουμε και την υπόλοιπη διπλώνοντας με κουτάλι ή σπάτουλα.
Μοιράζουμε τη μους σε 6 ψηλά ποτήρια και την παγώνουμε για 3 ώρες.

white-chocolate-mousse-with-yogurt-and-b.name: White Chocolate Mousse With Yogurt And Blueberries
white-chocolate-mousse-with-yogurt-and-b.original_name: Μους λευκής σοκολάτας με γιαούρτι και μύρτιλα

ingredients.item: Παγωμένα κόκκινα φρούτα για το σερβίρισμα
Παγωμένα κόκκινα φρούτα για το σερβίρισμα

instructions: Όλα τα υλικά πρέπει να είναι σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου.
Ψιλοκόβουμε τη λευκή σοκολάτα και τη μεταφέρουμε σε ένα μπολ για μπεν μαρί.
Προσθέτουμε την κρέμα γάλακτος και ζεσταίνουμε σε μέτρια φωτιά, ανακατεύοντας για λίγα λεπτά, μέχρι να λιώσει η σοκολάτα και να ομογενοποιηθεί το μείγμα.
Αποσύρουμε από τη φωτιά και αφήνουμε τη μους να σταθεί για περίπου 5 λεπτά, ώστε να πέσει ελαφρώς η θερμοκρασία της.
Σε ένα μπολ ανακατεύουμε το γιαούρτι και το προσθέτουμε κουταλιά-κουταλιά στο μείγμα της λιωμένης λευκής σοκολάτας, ανακατεύοντας συνεχώς μέχρι να σχηματιστεί μια λεία και βελούδινη μους.
Όταν τα υλικά ομογενοποιηθούν πλήρως, τοποθετούμε λίγα παγωμένα φρούτα στα μπολ σερβιρίσματος και μοιράζουμε από πάνω τη μους με ένα κουτάλι.
Βάζουμε τα μπολ στο ψυγείο μέχρι να παγώσει και να σταθεροποιηθεί η μους.
Πριν το σερβίρισμα, γαρνίρουμε με κόκκινα φρούτα.

white-chocolate-orange-cookies-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Orange Cookies
instructions: 1. Tereyağı ve şekeri mikser yardımıyla iyice çırpın.
2.  Üzerine 1 yumurta ekleyip çırpmaya devam edin.
3.  Sırayla portakal suyu, rendelenmiş portakal kabuğu, un, kabartma tozu ve vanilyayı ekleyip karıştırın.
4.  Son olarak beyaz damla çikolatayı ekleyip karıştırın.
5.  Tepsiye yağlı kağıt serin.
6.  Kaşık yardımıyla kurabiye hamurunu tepsiye aralıklı olarak paylaştırın.
7.  Önceden ısıtılmış 160 dereceye ayarlı fırında yaklaşık 10-12 dakika pişirin.
8.  Soğuyunca servis yapın.
9. Adım adım anlatımıyla klasik portakallı kurabiye tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

white-chocolate-oreo-truffles.name: White Chocolate Oreo Truffles
instructions: Line a large baking sheet with waxed paper.
Place all cookies in a food processor; pulse into fine crumbs.
Transfer cookie crumbs to a large bowl. Add cream cheese and beat with an electric mixer until a soft dough forms, scraping down the sides of the bowl and the beaters as needed to ensure even mixing.
Roll dough mixture into 1-inch balls. Place balls onto the prepared baking sheet and refrigerate until firm, about 30 minutes.
Place white chocolate into a microwave-safe glass or ceramic bowl; microwave in 1-minute intervals, stirring after each interval, until melted, 3 to 4 minutes.

Use two forks to dip each ball into melted chocolate; turn until ball is coated, then lift, letting excess chocolate drip back into the bowl, and return to the waxed paper. Refrigerate until chocolate coating is set, about 30 minutes.

white-chocolate-panna-cotta-with-stewed-.name: White Chocolate Panna Cotta With Stewed Strawberries
instructions: Combine heavy cream, white chocolate, 1 tablespoon sugar, and vanilla bean paste in a saucepan over low heat; cook and stir until chocolate has melted and mixture is smooth, 5 to 7 minutes.
Place boiling water in a small bowl; sprinkle gelatin powder over water and stir until dissolved. Stir gelatin mixture into white chocolate mixture until smooth.
Divide white chocolate mixture among six 1/2-cup ramekins. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until set, about 4 hours.

Combine strawberries, orange juice, and 2 teaspoons white sugar in a saucepan over medium heat; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer, covered, until strawberries have softened and mixture has a syrupy consistency, 2 to 3 minutes. Remove from heat, cover, and refrigerate until chilled, about 30 minutes.
Spoon stewed strawberries over each ramekin; serve.

white-chocolate-parfait-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Parfait

ingredients.item: 2.5 su bardağı krema ya da kremşanti
Yarım su bardağı hindistan cevizi sütü

instructions: 1. Geniş kenarlı fırın kabını streç filmle kaplayın.
2.  Beyaz çikolata ve yarım su bardağı kremayı benmari usulü eritin.
3.  Bir su bardağı krema ve sütü ısıtın.
4.  Diğer tarafta yumurta sarılarını ve şekeri iyice çırpın.
5.  Sıcak krema karışımına şekerli yumurta karışımını ekleyip çırpın.
6.  2-3 dakika iyice yoğunlaşıncaya kadar karıştırarak kaynatmadan pişirin.
7.  Ocaktan alın.
8.  Eritilmiş çikolata, Hindistan cevizi ve Hindistan cevizi sütünü ilave edin.
9.  Soğumaya bırakın.
10.  Kalan kremayı iyice incelene kadar çırpın.
11.  Çikolatalı Hindistan cevizli karışıma ekleyin.
12.  İki su bardağı parfe karışımını kalıba aktarın.
13.  Üzerini örtüp 2 saat buzlukta bekletin.
14.  Buzluktan çıkardığınız parfenin üzerine fındıkları serpin.
15.  Ayırdığınız parfe karışımını üzerine ilave edin.
16.  Üzerini örtüp bir gece buzlukta bekletin.
17.  Çikolatalı krema için, çikolata, tereyağı ve balı benmari usulü, sürekli karıştırarak eritin.
18.  Kremayı kaynatmadan ısıtın.
19.  Çikolatalı karışıma ilave edip soğumaya bırakın.
20.  Buzlukta iyice donan parfeyi servis tabağına ters çevirerek alın.
21.  Hazırladığınız çikolata sosu üzerine gezdirin.
22.  Toz Antep fıstığı ile süsleyip servis yapın.
23. Dilerseniz, bitter çikolata ile hazırlanan yoğun aromalı çikolatalı parfe tarifine de göz atabilirsiniz.

white-chocolate-peppermint-bark.name: White Chocolate Peppermint Bark
instructions: Line an 11x17-inch baking sheet with parchment paper.

Melt white chocolate chips in a microwave-safe glass bowl on 50 percent power for 3 minutes. Stir well until the bowl is no longer warm. Microwave for 3 more minutes more, then stir again. Heat for 1 more minute and stir again. Repeat as necessary until chocolate is completely smooth.

Stir candy canes and one drop of peppermint oil into melted chocolate until well combined; taste and add an additional drop of peppermint oil if needed. Spread onto the prepared baking sheet and smooth with a spatula. Refrigerate until set, 30 minutes to overnight. Break into pieces and store in an airtight container.

white-chocolate-peppermint-cheesecake.name: White Chocolate Peppermint Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a 9-inch springform pan with 2 sheets of aluminum foil.

Crush chocolate cookies into fine crumbs using a food processor. Add melted butter and stir until well combined. Transfer crumb mixture into the prepared pan. Press down crumbs to create an even crust, completely covering the bottom of the pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until just set, 8 to 10 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Beat cream cheese in a large bowl or the bowl of a stand mixer with an electric mixer until smooth. Add sugar and mix well. Mix in melted almond bark, flour, heavy cream, peppermint extract, and salt, scraping the bowl prior to each new addition; mix well. Add 1 egg at a time on medium-low speed. Mix until smooth. Fold in creme de menthe and peppermint crunch baking chips.
Transfer the springform pan with the cooked crust to a large roasting pan. Pour filling into the crust. Add enough hot water to the roasting pan to reach halfway up the sides of the springform pan.

Bake in the center of the preheated oven until set, about 1 hour. Turn off the oven. Leave cake in the oven, keeping the door shut, for an additional 45 minutes. Remove and allow to sit for at least 1 hour before chilling.
Chill for 4 hours, to overnight.

Beat softened cream cheese, white chocolate, whipped topping, sugar, and vanilla extract for mousse together in a medium bowl with an electric mixer until smooth and slightly thickened. Add mousse to the top of the cheesecake. Chill for at least 4 more hours.
Remove the sides of the springform pan. Cut into slices and enjoy.

white-chocolate-popcorn.name: White Chocolate Popcorn
instructions: Pop 1 popcorn package at a time in the microwave on high until popping begins to slow down, about 2 1/2 minutes. Open bags carefully and transfer popcorn to a large plastic bag, discarding any burnt pieces or unpopped kernels.
Melt white chocolate chips with butter in top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring frequently and scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula, until mixture is creamy, about 5 minutes.
Drizzle melted chocolate over popcorn. Close bag and shake until thoroughly coated, 3 to 4 minutes. Place in the refrigerator to cool, about 1 hour.

white-chocolate-pudding-cake-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Pudding Cake
instructions: 1. Puding için, toz şeker ve nişastayı bir sos tenceresinde harmanlayın.
2.  Yavaşça sütü ekleyin.
3.  Koyulaşıncaya kadar sürekli karıştırarak pişirin.
4.  Yumurta sarısını bir kasede çırpın.
5.  Kaynayan sütlü karışımdan bir kepçe kadar alarak yumurta sarısına ilave edin edin.
6.  Ilınan yumurta sarısını tencereye ekleyin.
7.  Kabarcıklar oluşuncaya kadar karıştırarak pişirip ocaktan alın.
8.  Beyaz çikolata, limon suyu, tereyağı ve vanilyayı ilave edip karıştırın.
9.  Ilındıktan sonra bir kaseye alın.
10.  Üzerini streç filmle sarıp bir gece buzdolabında dinlendirin.
11.  Keki için, yumurtaları bir karıştırma kabına alın.
12.  Bir mikser yardımıyla 4 dakika çırpın.
13.  Yumurtalar köpürmeye başladığında toz şekeri ilave edip şeker tamamen eriyinceye kadar çırpmaya devam edin.
14.  Buğday unu, kabartma tozu ve tuzu bir karıştırma kabında harmanlayıp yumurtalı karışıma ilave edin.
15.  Süt ve tereyağını bir sos tenceresine alın.
16.  Tereyağı tamamen eriyinceye kadar karıştırarak pişirin.
17.  Vanilyayı ilave edip ocaktan alın.
18.  Karışımı hafif ılındırıp yumurtalı karışıma ilave edin.
19.  Tüm malzeme iyice özdeşleşinceye kadar bir spatula yardımıyla karıştırın.
20.  Yuvarlak bir fırın kabına kenarlarından sarkacak şekilde yağlı kağıt serin.
21.  Hazırladığınız harcı kaba aktarın.
22.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 20 dakika pişirin.
23.  Fırından alıp üzerine ince kıyılmış fındık ve toz şeker serpin.
24.  Tekrar fırına verip 5-10 dakika daha pişirin.
25.  Fırından alıp soğumaya bırakın.
26.  Soğuyan keki ortadan ikiye kesin.
27.  Fındıklı kısım üstte olacak şekilde ortasına hazırladığınız beyaz çikolatalı pudingi sürün.
28.  Üzerini fındıklı parça ile kapatarak servis yapın.
29.  Afiyet olsun.
30. Öğle molalarında veya akşam yemeklerinden sonra sunabileceğiniz beyaz çikolatalı puding tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

white-chocolate-pumpkin-spice-muffins.name: White Chocolate Pumpkin Spice Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line 9 muffin cups with paper liners.
Whisk 1 ½ cups flour, white sugar, brown sugar, pumpkin pie spice, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl until well combined. Set aside.
Combine pumpkin purée, oil, milk, egg, vanilla extract, and lemon extract in a separate large bowl until smooth; stir into flour mixture until batter is just combined.
Toss white chocolate chips and 1 tablespoon flour together in a small bowl until evenly coated; fold into batter. Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into centers comes out clean, 15 to 20 minutes.

white-chocolate-raspberry-cheesecake.name: White Chocolate Raspberry Cheesecake
instructions: To make the crust: Mix together cookie crumbs, melted butter, and sugar in a medium bowl. Press mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.

To make the raspberry sauce: Combine raspberries, water, sugar, and cornstarch in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and continue boiling until sauce is thick, about 5 minutes. Strain through a mesh strainer to remove seeds. Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
To make the cheesecake filling: Melt white chocolate chips with half-and-half in a metal bowl over a pan of simmering water; stir occasionally until smooth.
Mix together cream cheese and sugar in a large bowl until smooth. Beat in eggs one at a time. Blend in vanilla and melted white chocolate mixture. Pour 1/2 of the batter over crust.

Spoon 3 tablespoons raspberry sauce over batter. Pour remaining cheesecake batter on top. Spoon 3 tablespoons raspberry sauce over batter. Swirl batter with the tip of a knife to create a marbled effect.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set, 55 to 60 minutes. Cool cheesecake at room temperature, then cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until thoroughly chilled, 8 hours to overnight.
Remove cheesecake from the pan and serve with remaining raspberry sauce.

white-chocolate-roll-cake-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Roll Cake
instructions: 1. 4 yumurta akını kaseye alın.
2.  Mikserle kar gibi olana kadar çırpın.
3.  Başka bir kapta 4 yumurta sarısı ve şekeri çırpın.
4.  Balı ve suyu ilave edin.
5.  Yumurta aklarını spatula ile yavaşça yumurta sarılı malzemeye yedirin.
6.  Kakao ve unu ekleyip spatula ile karıştırın.
7.  Yağlı kağıt serilmiş fırın tepsisine malzemeyi döküp yayın.
8.  Önceden ısıtılmış 160 derece fırında 20 dakika pişirin.
9.  Fırından alıp üzerine temiz bir mutfak havlusu yerleştirin.
10.  Dikkatlice rulo şeklinde sarın.
11.  3 yumurta akını kuru bir cam kaseye alın.
12.  Kar gibi olana kadar mikserle çırpın.
13.  Beyaz çikolatayı küçük parçalar şeklinde kırın.
14.  Şeker ve kremayla birlikte cam kaseye alıp karıştırarak benmari usulü eritin.
15.  Jelatini ilave edip karıştırın.
16.  Kaseyi sıcak suyun üzerinden alın.
17.  Çırpılmış yumurta aklarını ekleyip yavaş hareketlerle karıştırın.
18.  Keki dikkatlice açıp üzerine bu harcı yayın.
19.  Tekrar rulo şeklinde sarın.
20.  Buzdolabında 40 dakika bekletin.
21.  Kremayı kaynama noktasına gelmeden ısıtın.
22.  Üzerine çikolatayı ekleyip karıştırın.
23.  Ocaktan alıp karıştırarak ılındırın.
24.  Buzdolabında katılaşmasını sağlayın.
25.  Rulo kekin üzerini çikolatalı krema ile kaplayın.
26.  Buzdolabında dinlendirdikten sonra servis yapın.
27.  Afiyet olsun.
28. Dilerseniz, klasik çikolatalı rulo pasta tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

white-chocolate-sauce-and-strawberry-tar.name: White Chocolate Sauce And Strawberry Tart
white-chocolate-sauce-and-strawberry-tar.original_name: Beyaz Çikolata Soslu Ve Çilekli Tart
instructions: 1. Derin bir kapta tart hamuru için gerekli tüm malzemeyi karıştırıp iyice yoğurun.
2.  Tart kalıbını margarin ile yağlayın.
3.  Tart hamurunu merdane yardımıyla üzerine un serperek tart kalıbının büyüklüğüne göre açın.
4.  Kalıba hamuru yerleştirin.
5.  Önceden ısıtılmış 160 dereceye ayarlı fırında hafif pembeleşinceye kadar pişirin.
6.  Fırından çıkarıp soğumaya bırakın.
7.  Çilekleri ayıklayıp yıkayın.
8.  Tencereye su ve toz şekeri alıp kaynatın.
9.  Mısır nişastasını 1 çay bardağı su ile karıştırın ve kaynayan tencereye yavaş yavaş ilave edip karıştırın.
10.  Tencereyi ocaktan alıp üzerine 1 paket jöle ilave edip iyice karıştırın.
11.  Bol suyla yıkanmış ve temizlenmiş çilekleri ekleyin.
12.  Fırından çıkarıp soğuttuğunuz tartın üzerine döküp yayın.
13.  Diğer yanda kremayı kaynama noktasına gelmeden ısıtıp ocaktan alın.
14.  Üzerine beyaz çikolatayı kırarak ekleyin ve karıştırın.
15.  Çikolata eridikten sonra buzdolabında soğutun.
16.  Ardından mikser yardımıyla çırpın.
17.  Dinlendirdiğiniz tartı dilimleyerek servis tabaklarına alın.
18.  Krema sıkma torbası ile sosu çileklerin üzerine sıkın ve servis yapın.
19.  Afiyet olsun.
20. Avrupa ülkelerinde sık sık tüketilen klasik çilekli tart tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

white-chocolate-snack-mix.name: White Chocolate Snack Mix
instructions: Line 3 baking sheets with waxed paper or parchment. Set aside.
In a large bowl, combine mini pretzels, toasted oat cereal, crispy corn cereal squares, salted peanuts, and candy-coated chocolate pieces. Set aside.
In a microwave-safe bowl, heat chips and oil on medium-high for 2 minutes, stirring once. Microwave on high for 10 seconds; stir until smooth. Pour over cereal mixture and mix well.
Spread onto prepared baking sheets. Cool; break apart. Store in an airtight container.

white-chocolate-tangerine-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Tangerine
instructions: 1. Yumurta sarıları, mandalina likörü ve şekeri cam kasenin içine alın.
2.  Kaseyi içinde kaynar su bulunan bir kabın üzerine yerleştirin.
3.  Karışımı kabarıncaya kadar mikserle çırpın.
4.  Cam kaseyi kaynar suyun üzerinden alın.
5. Kremayı başka bir kapta kabarıncaya kadar mikserle çırpın.
6.  Krema ve eritilmiş çikolatayı likörlü karışımın üzerine ekleyip tekrar mikserle çırpın.
7.  Karışımı istediğiniz şekilli bir kalıba doldurup buzdolabında katılaşana kadar bekletin.
8.  Yaprak jelatini soğuk suyun içinde yumuşayana kadar bekletin.
9.  Suyunu elinizle sıkarak yaprak jelatini suyun içinden alın.
10. Mandalina jölesi için mandalina suyu ve şekeri bir tencerede kaynatın.
11.  Jelatini ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
12.  Bir cm kalınlığında olacak şekilde bir kalıbın içine döküp donması için buzdolabında bekletin.
13.  Mandalina salatası için mandalina dilimlerini nar taneleriyle bir kapta karıştırın.

white-chocolate-tart-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Tart
instructions: 1. Un, tereyağı, şeker, vanilya ve tuzu mutfak robotuna alıp ekmek kırıntısı haline gelinceye kadar karıştırın.
2.  Yumurta sarılarını ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Hamuru yağlanmış tart kalıplarına yerleştirin ve 15 dakika buzdolabında soğutun.
4.  Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayıp kalıpları yerleştirin ve hafif kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
5.  Fırından çıkartıp soğumaya bırakın.
6.  Kremayı ısıtıp küçük parçalara bölünmüş çikolataları ekleyin ve eriyinceye kadar karıştırın.
7.  Karışımı tart tabanlarına paylaştırın ve çikolata donuncaya kadar buzdolabında bekletin.
8.  Truf ile süsleyerek servis yapın.
9. Yoğun aromalı bitter parçaları ile hazırlanan klasik çikolatalı tart tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

white-chocolate-cherry-mousse-pie.name: White Chocolate-cherry Mousse Pie
instructions: Stir chocolate in medium metal bowl set over saucepan of simmering water until melted and smooth. Remove bowl. Place sheet of waxed paper on work surface. Pour chocolate onto paper. Working quickly and using offset spatula, spread chocolate in thin layer over paper into 10x10-inch square. Place second sheet of waxed paper over, pressing to release most air bubbles. Roll paper up tightly into 3/4-inch-wide roll and chill until set, about 2 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 5 days ahead. Wrap in plastic and keep chilled. See our slideshow on How to Make Dark Chocolate Shards.

Stir cherries and preserves in medium saucepan over medium-high heat until preserves melt and mixture begins to simmer. Reduce heat to medium and continue to simmer until cherries begin to soften, stirring often, about 5 minutes. Stir in almond extract. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Rewarm slightly before serving.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Lightly coat 9-inch-diameter glass pie dish with nonstick spray. Process broken cookies, sugar, and pinch of salt in processor until cookies are finely ground. Add melted butter; using on/off turns, process until incorporated. Press firmly and evenly onto bottom and up sides of prepared dish.
Bake crust until firm, about 12 minutes. Transfer pie dish to rack; cool completely.
Place 2 tablespoons water in small bowl. Sprinkle gelatin over; let stand until softened, about 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, stir 3/4 cup cream and white chocolate in small saucepan over medium-low heat until chocolate is smooth. Remove from heat. Add gelatin mixture; stir until dissolved. Transfer to large bowl. Stir in 3/4 cup cream. Refrigerate just until chilled but not set, stirring occasionally, about 1 hour.

Using electric mixer, beat chilled white chocolate mixture until firm peaks form. Fold in chopped cherries. Using clean dry beaters, beat egg whites in medium bowl until foamy. Add almond extract and pinch of salt and continue beating until soft peaks form. Gradually beat in sugar. Continue beating until stiff peaks form. Add egg white mixture to white chocolate mixture; fold just to incorporate.

Spoon white chocolate mousse into cooled crust, mounding in center. Unroll dark chocolate shards from waxed-paper roll (chocolate will break into long, curved pieces when paper is opened). Arrange shards decoratively atop mousse. Chill until mousse is set, at least 4 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover with cake dome and keep chilled.
Cut pie into wedges and serve with warm cherry compote.

white-chocolate-cranberry-scones.name: White Chocolate-cranberry Scones
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking tray with parchment paper.

Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in white chocolate chips and cranberries. Mix in buttermilk and egg until just combined and dough forms a shaggy ball.
Roll out slightly and cut into 12 triangles. Place on the prepared baking tray. Brush each scone with a little cream and sprinkle with some coarse sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until barely golden around the edges, about 15 minutes.

white-chocolate-cream-cheese-fruit-tart.name: White Chocolate-cream Cheese Fruit Tart
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Grease a 12-inch tart pan.
Beat butter and confectioners' sugar together in a bowl using an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Mix in flour until mixture is crumbly. Press into the prepared tart pan.
Bake crust until lightly browned, 25 to 30 minutes. Cool completely.

Beat melted and cooled white chocolate and heavy cream together in a bowl until smooth. Beat in cream cheese until thoroughly combined. Spread over cooled crust. Chill in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.

Combine 1/2 cup water and white sugar in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Mix remaining 1/2 cup water and cornstarch together in a bowl until cornstarch dissolves; add to sugar mixture. Cook and stir until mixture thickens and becomes clear, about 5 minutes. Stir in corn syrup; return to a boil. Remove glaze from heat; cool for 10 minutes.
Arrange strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries over cream cheese layer; brush with glaze. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving; store in the refrigerator.

white-chocolate-lime-muffins.name: White Chocolate-lime Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 12-cup muffin tin or line each cup with paper liners.
Combine flour, white sugar, 1/4 cup brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl.
Combine lime juice, melted butter, eggs, and rum in a small bowl. Slowly stir into the flour mixture until moistened. Fold in white chocolate chips.
Pour batter into the prepared muffin cups. Sprinkle remaining brown sugar over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean, about 25 minutes.

white-chocolate-raspberry-cookies.name: White Chocolate-raspberry Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with aluminum foil.

Beat butter, brown sugar, and white sugar together in a bowl using an electric mixer until creamy. Beat in egg, heavy cream, and vanilla extract. Beat in cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. Add flour little by little until completely blended. Stir in white chocolate chips; fold in macadamia nuts and raspberries.
Drop dough by rounded tablespoons onto the prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden, 12 to 13 minutes. Remove from the oven and transfer to a wire rack to cool.

white-chocolatecranberry-cake.name: White Chocolate–cranberry Cake

ingredients.item: . vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Nonstick vegetable oil spray or unsalted butter
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract
A pastry bag and a  0.25"-diameter or other medium round tip

instructions: Finely grate zest from 1 large orange into a small bowl; cover and set aside. Halve orange and squeeze juice into a measuring glass (you should have about ¼ cup); set aside.

Cook 8 oz. fresh or frozen cranberries, ¾ cup (150 g) sugar, and ¼ cup water in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring often, until sugar is dissolved and cranberries are coated in syrup but still intact, 5–7 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer about ¼ cup cranberries to a wire rack; let sit until dried slightly and tacky, about 10 minutes.
Place remaining ⅓ cup (67 g) sugar in a small bowl. Add cranberries and toss to coat evenly; set aside in sugar.

Add 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter, 2 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and reserved orange juice to remaining cranberries in pan. Cook, stirring often, until cranberries burst, juices are syrupy, and pan is visible when a spoon is dragged across the bottom, 12–15 minutes. Let cool, then transfer to a large measuring glass and blend with an immersion blender to make a coarse jam. (Or, use a regular blender.)
Do Ahead: Sugared cranberries and jam can be made 6 hours ahead. Store separately, covered, at room temperature.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Lightly coat two 8"-diameter cake pans with nonstick vegetable oil spray or unsalted butter, room temperature; line bottoms with parchment paper rounds. Mix 2 cups plus 3 Tbsp. (250 g) bleached cake flour, 1½ cups (300 g) sugar, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1½ tsp. baking powder, and ½ tsp. baking soda in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on low speed to combine, about 1 minute.

Add ½ cup vegetable oil and 6 Tbsp. (¾ stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, increase speed to medium-low, and beat until a thick paste forms (it should resemble wet sand), about 1 minute. Add 1 cup buttermilk, 2 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract, and reserved orange zest; beat until pale and fluffy, about 2 minutes (this mixing time will help keep the cake from sinking later; don’t worry about overmixing).
Add 3 large eggs one at a time, beating 30 seconds after each addition; batter should be smooth and creamy. Divide between prepared pans; smooth surface.

Bake cakes until a wooden tester inserted into the centers comes out with only a few moist crumbs attached, 30–35 minutes. Transfer pans to a wire rack; let cakes cool in pans 15 minutes. Run an offset spatula or small knife around sides of cakes to loosen; turn out onto rack (leave parchment). Let cakes cool completely.
Do Ahead: Cakes can be baked 1 day ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

Heat 12 oz. white chocolate, coarsely chopped, in a heatproof bowl set over a saucepan of barely simmering water (bowl should not touch water), stirring, until melted and smooth. Remove bowl from heat and let white chocolate cool until barely lukewarm but still fluid.

Beat 8 oz. cream cheese, room temperature, 10 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, and a large pinch of kosher salt in the clean bowl of stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium speed until light and creamy, 8–10 minutes. Reduce speed to low and, working in 2–3 batches, add white chocolate, beating to combine after each addition. (If chocolate is too warm, frosting may be soupy. Chill until it’s cold around the edges, then beat until smooth.)

Remove parchment paper from cakes; discard. Place a cake, right side up, on a
cake
stand or large plate (a cake turntable works great). Transfer 1 cup frosting to pastry
bag
fitted with tip. Pipe a border of frosting along top edges of cake. Spread 1 cup
cranberry
jam over surface within frosting border. Place second cake, upside down, on top. Spread
top
and sides of cake with remaining frosting in bowl. Pipe a ring of frosting around top
edges
of cake and fill in surface with remaining jam. Chill cake until frosting is firm, 30–40
minutes.

Just before serving, arrange reserved sugared cranberries on top of jam. If using, remove wide pieces of zest from 1 large orange with a vegetable peeler, leaving white pith behind. Cut zest into thin strips and arrange around piped edges of cake.
Do Ahead: Cake (without sugared cranberries and orange zest) can be assembled 8 hours ahead. Cover loosely and chill. Let sit at room temperature at least 1 hour before serving.

white-christmas-candy.name: White Christmas Candy
instructions: Mix white chocolate chips and peanut butter together in a large microwave-safe bowl.
Microwave on high for 1 minute; stir with a spatula. Continue cooking in microwave in 30 second intervals; stir until smooth. Fold in rice cereal, marshmallows, and peanuts.
Drop white chocolate mixture by spoonfuls onto a sheet of waxed paper. Sprinkle each mound with sprinkles. Set aside to cool for 30 minutes.

white-christmas-pie.name: White Christmas Pie
instructions: Sprinkle gelatin over cold water; set aside to soften.

Combine 1/2 cup sugar, flour, and salt in a saucepan. Gradually stir in milk. Cook over low heat, stirring until it boils. Boil for 1 minute, and remove from heat. Transfer to a large bowl. Stir in softened gelatin. When partially set, beat with a rotary mixer until smooth. Blend in vanilla and 1 cup coconut.
Whip the cream until stiff. Gently fold into coconut mixture.
Beat egg whites in a clean bowl until frothy. Beat in cream of tartar and 1/2 cup sugar. Continue beating until egg whites form stiff peaks. Fold into coconut mixture.
Pile filling into prepared pie shell. Sprinkle with additional flaked coconut. Chill pie for at least 2 hours or overnight before serving.

white-coffee-ice-cream.name: White Coffee Ice Cream
instructions: Place the bowl of ice cream maker in the freezer.

Combine cream, sugar, and egg yolks in a saucepan; cook and stir over medium-low heat until mixture is heated through but not boiling, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove saucepan from heat and add coffee beans. Transfer cream mixture to a bowl and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Strain coffee beans out of cream mixture. Stir milk, vanilla extract, and salt into cream mixture; transfer to bowl of ice cream maker.
Process cream mixture in the ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions.

white-cookies-with-mastic-mastic-lezzet.name: White Cookies With Mastic Mastic
instructions: 1. Tereyağı, pudra şekeri ve damla sakızı macununu geniş bir kaba alarak yoğurun.
2.  Hamur hafif toparlanmaya başlayınca un, buğday nişastası ve Ayçiçek yağını ilave edip tüm malzeme iyice özdeşleşinceye kadar yoğurun.
3.  Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar kopartıp yuvarlayın ve yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
4.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 15 dakika pişirin.
5.  Tel ızgara üzerine alıp soğutun.
6.  Üzerlerine pudra şekeri serperek servis yapın.

white-cranberry-sangria.name: White Cranberry Sangria
instructions: In a large pitcher, combine the orange, lime, cranberries, simple syrup, vodka, orange liqueur, white cranberry juice, and white wine. Stir well, then chill until ready to serve, up to 2 days.
Immediately before serving, add the lemon-lime soda and stir to incorporate.
Pour into glasses and garnish with orange wedges.
Enjoy!

white-cupcakes.name: White Cupcakes
instructions: Arrange racks in lower and upper thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Line two standard 12-cup muffin tins with cupcake liners.

Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and baking soda in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment. Add butter, buttermilk, and oil; beat on medium speed, scraping down sides of bowl, until smooth.

Whisk egg whites, egg, vanilla extract, and almond extract, if using, in a medium bowl until smooth. Add egg mixture to flour mixture in 2 additions, beating well between additions. Continue to beat on medium speed until mixture is homogenous and very thick, about 2 minutes.

Divide batter evenly among muffin cups, filling two-thirds full (a level ⅓ cup batter per cupcake). Bake, rotating pans halfway through, until cupcakes have domed and spring back when touched in the center, 20–25 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool.
Do Ahead: Cupcakes can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

white-dessert-with-peach-and-kiwi-lezzet.name: White Dessert With Peach And Kiwi
instructions: 1. Yaprak jelatinleri soğuk su dolu bir kapta ıslatıp yumuşaması için bekletin.
2.  Meyveleri soyup zar şeklinde kesin.
3. Krema, şeker ve vanilyayı bir tencere de sürekli karıştırarak bir taşım kaynayıncaya kadar pişirin.
4.  Ocaktan alıp yumuşamış jelatinleri avucunuzda sıkarak karışıma ilave edin.
5.  Bir tahta kaşık yardımıyla jelatinler tamamen eriyinceye dek karıştırın.
6.  Ilınmaya bırakın.
7. Dikdörtgen bir kek kalıbının içine ılınmış tatlıdan dörtte birini dökün.
8.  Bu şekilde 15 dakika bekletin ve üzerine ince dilimlenmiş meyvelerin yarısını dizin.
9.  Bu işlemi malzeme bitene dek tekrarlayın.
10.  Buzdolabında en az iki saat bekletin.
11.  Servis etmeden önce taze meyve ve soslarla süsleyebilirsiniz.
12.  Dilimleyip servis yapın.

white-fruitcake.name: White Fruitcake
instructions: Chop raisins, pineapple chunks, and cherries into smaller pieces and transfer to a large bowl.
Add currants, orange peel, and citron peel to the bowl. Pour in orange juice, cover, and soak, 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat the oven to 135°C (135 degrees C). Place a small pan of water on a lower shelf in the oven. Line one 5x9-inch loaf pan and two 3x8-inch loaf pans with parchment paper.
Beat butter in a large bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Gradually beat in confectioners' sugar until incorporated.

Whisk egg yolks in a separate bowl until thick and pale in color. Add to the butter mixture and mix until incorporated. Mix in soaked fruit and orange juice mixture, then gradually mix in sifted flour.
In another clean bowl, beat egg whites until peaks form. Fold egg whites into the batter. Fill each of the prepared pans 2/3 full with batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown and a toothpick comes out clean when inserted in the center, 2 to 2 ½ hours.

white-gazpacho-teleculinaria.name: White Gazpacho
instructions: Descasque as batatas, corte-as em pedaços e deite-os num tacho. Junte a água e os dentes de alho descascados, tempere com sal, leve ao lume e deixe cozer.
No final, triture a sopa com a varinha mágica, retifique o sal e reserve no frio até à hora de servir.
No momento de servir, adicione as natas e um pouco de sumo de limão. Sirva bem fresco, decorado com cebolinho picado.

white-gazpacho-ajo-blanco.name: White Gazpacho "ajo Blanco

ingredients.item: Fine sea salt plus more for seasoning
Verjus or 2 tbsp. champagne vinegar plus 3 tbsp. water
Olive oil plus more for garnish

instructions: Combine cucumbers, grapes, bread, almonds, garlic, and 1 1/2 tsp. salt in a large bowl (the salt helps draw out naturally existing water from ingredients). Cover and let marinate in refrigerator for at least 12 hours and up to 24 hours.

Transfer cucumber mixture with any accumulated juices to a blender and purée until very smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl. Vigorously whisk in yogurt, olive oil, vinegar, verjus, almond oil (if using), and honey until smooth. Chill until cold, about 30 minutes. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Preheat oven to 350°. Toss bread with 1 Tbsp. oil; season with salt. Scatter bread over a small rimmed baking sheet.
Bake bread cubes until golden brown, 7–8 minutes; let cool. Do ahead: Croutons can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Season soup to taste with salt. Divide among chilled bowls. Garnish with green grapes, red grapes, cucumber, chives, almonds, and croutons. Drizzle with oil.

white-hot-chocolate-mix.name: White Hot Chocolate Mix
instructions: Mix milk powder and creamer together in a large bowl.
Mix sugar and butter flavoring together in a small bowl until fully incorporated. Mix into milk powder mixture vigorously using hands to decrease lumps.
Shred white chocolate using a small microplane or small shred side of a box grater; add to mixture. Stir lightly using a spoon to incorporate without melting chocolate.

white-hot-chocolate-with-cinnamon.name: White Hot Chocolate With Cinnamon

ingredients.item: Unsweetened whipped cream and ground cinnamon

instructions: Toast cinnamon sticks in a medium dry saucepan over medium heat until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add salt and 2 cups milk and bring to a simmer. Remove from heat and let steep 10 minutes.

Whisk cornstarch and remaining ½ cup milk in a small bowl. Add to warm milk mixture and heat over medium. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring constantly, until warmed through, about 1 minute. Remove from heat and add chocolate and vanilla. Let sit until chocolate is melted, about 30 seconds, then stir to combine. Discard cinnamon sticks.
Divide hot chocolate between mugs. Top with whipped cream and dust with ground cinnamon.

white-icing-argiro.name: White Icing
instructions: Θα χρησιμοποιήσουμε μπεν μαρί. Στο μπολ του μπεν μαρι βάζουμε όλα τα υλικά που θα χρειαστούμε στη συνταγή μας για το λευκο γλασο.
Με μιξερ χειρος χτυπάμε τα υλικά μέσα στο μπολ σε δυνατή ταχύτητα για 7′.
Το μιγμα θα πάρει 3 φορές τον όγκο του.
Θα φουσκώσει πολύ, θα γυαλίσει και θα γίνει ελαστικό και σφιχτό.
Δεν σταματάμε καθόλου το χτύπημα με το μίξερ στο μπεν μαρι μέχρι το μιγμα να γίνει γυαλιστερό και πυκνό σαν σαντιγι.
Αν θέλουμε το χρωματίζουμε με χρώμα ζαχαροπλαστικής, το βάζουμε σε κορνέ ζαχαροπλαστικής στο ψυγείο μέχρι να χρησιμοποιήσουμε.
Το γλάσο αυτό είναι ιδανικό για να γαρνίρεις τούρτες , κορμούς , lemon pie , cheesecake λεμόνι ή για να γεμίσεις κέικ . Είναι σταθερό γλάσο πολύ αφράτο και πεντανόστιμο.

white-kimchi.name: White Kimchi
instructions: Peel and chop pear, ginger, and garlic. Place in a food processor, add salt, and process to a fine paste. Transfer to a large bowl and add Napa cabbage, daikon, and scallions. Massage mixture with your hands until very well combined and cabbage starts releasing its liquid. Continue massaging until there is enough liquid to completely submerge cabbage (press it down into bowl to check).

Transfer cabbage and liquid to a large crock or jar. Place a plate on top of cabbage and weight with a jar filled with pie weights or water so cabbage stays submerged. Seal crock or cover with cheesecloth and secure with a rubber band. Let sit at room temperature 5–7 days to ferment (the longer it sits, the more pronounced the flavor will be), then chill.
Do Ahead: Kimchi can be made 6 months ahead. Keep chilled.

white-lentils-argiro.name: White Lentils
instructions: Μουλιάζουμε το σιτάρι από το προηγούμενο βράδυ σε μπολ με μπόλικο νερό. Εναλλακτικά, μπορείτε να χρησιμοποιήσετε χοντρό πλιγούρι που βράζει πιο γρήγορα.
Βράζουμε τις φακές για 5’ και πετάμε το νερό. Τις στραγγίζουμε.
Καθαρίζουμε τη γλυκοπατάτα και την κόβουμε σε μικρά καρέ.
Ζεσταίνουμε 2 κ.σ. από το ελαιόλαδο σε μέτρια κατσαρόλα και σοτάρουμε τα κρεμμύδια και το πράσο για 3-4’.
Προσθέτουμε το σκόρδο και σοτάρουμε για μισό λεπτό.
Έπειτα, προσθέτουμε τις φακές και το σιτάρι, το καρότο και την γλυκοπατάτα και ανακατεύουμε.
Προσθέτουμε νερό ζεστό να καλυφτούν οι φακές (ή ζωμό), το δαφνόφυλλο και το κύμινο.
Σιγομαγειρεύουμε τις φακές μέχρι να μαλακώσουν και να χυλώσουν και να μείνουν με λίγη σούπα.
Προς το τέλος του βρασμού αλατοπιπερώνουμε.
Όταν μαλακώσουν οι φακές και έχει χυλώσει το σιτάρι, προσθέτουμε το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο κι ανακατεύουμε δυνατά το φαγητό.
Τέλος, ρίχνουμε τον ξερό δυόσμο και σβήνουμε τις φακές.
Προσθέτουμε λίγες σταγόνες ξύδι από κρασί.
Αφήνουμε σκεπασμένο το φαγητό να σταθεί για 10’.
Σερβίρουμε σε βαθιά πιάτα τις χυλωμένες άσπρες φακές, με τα απίστευτα αρώματα και την μοναδική νοστιμιά.

white-mocha-syrup.name: White Mocha Syrup
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the sweetened condensed milk, whole milk, vanilla, and sugar. Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat and stir until sugar has dissolved.
Add the white chocolate chips and stir until melted. Stir in the instant coffee until dissolved. Remove the pot from the heat and let the syrup cool completely.
Transfer the syrup to an airtight container and store in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
Enjoy!

white-mushrooms-in-the-oven-with-potatoe.name: White Mushrooms In The Oven With Potatoes
white-mushrooms-in-the-oven-with-potatoe.original_name: Λευκά μανιτάρια στο φούρνο με πατάτες
instructions: Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 200°C, στις αντιστάσεις.
Ρίχνουμε σε ένα μπολ τα αποξηραμένα μανιτάρια και προσθέτουμε το καυτό νερό. Σκεπάζουμε το μπολ και το αφήνουμε στην άκρη.
Καθαρίζουμε τις πατάτες και τις κόβουμε σε λεπτές φέτες των 3 χλστ. Καθαρίζουμε τα φρέσκα μανιτάρια και τα κόβουμε σε χοντρές φέτες πάχους 1/2 εκ.
Λαδώνουμε ελαφρά ένα ρηχό ταψί και κάνουμε μια στρώση φέτες κρεμμυδιού.
Καλύπτουμε με μια στρώση πατάτας. Συνεχίζουμε με μια στρώση φρέσκων μανιταριών.
Πασπαλίζουμε με λεπτές φέτες κρεμμυδιού, λίγο σκόρδο, αλάτι, πιπέρι και λίγο μαϊντανό.
Επαναλαμβάνουμε τις στρώσεις πατάτα-μανιτάρι-κρεμμύδι-σκόρδο και μαϊντανό, πασπαλίζοντας ενδιάμεσα με αλάτι και φρεσκοτριμμένο πιπέρι.
Τέλος προσθέτουμε τα μουσκεμένα αποξηραμένα μανιτάρια (κρατάμε το νερό τους) και το θυμάρι και ραντίζουμε με το κρασί.
Περιχύνουμε με το ελαιόλαδο όλη την επιφάνεια του φαγητού. Ρίχνουμε από την άκρη του σκεύους το ζεστό νερό όπου μούλιασαν τα μανιτάρια.
Μεταφέρουμε το ταψί στην κάτω σχάρα του προθερμασμένου φούρνου και ψήνουμε για περίπου μία ώρα, μέχρι να ροδίσει η επιφάνεια και να μελώσει η πατάτα.
Αν διαπιστώσουμε κατά τη διάρκεια του ψησίματος ότι έχει στεγνώσει το ταψί, συμπληρώνουμε ελάχιστο ζεστό νερό, το οποίο ρίχνουμε πάντα στην άκρη του σκεύους (όχι στην επιφάνεια του φαγητού).

white-negroni.name: White Negroni
instructions: Combine gin, Lillet, and Suze in an old-fashioned glass filled with ice and stir until very cold, about 30 seconds.
