Garnish with a lemon twist.

white-noise-spritz.name: White Noise Spritz
instructions: Fill a 10-ounce Collins glass with ice. Add Cocchi and elderflower liqueur. Top with club soda, stir briefly with a long cocktail spoon, and garnish with a grapefruit twist.

white-onion-fennel-and-watercress-salad.name: White Onion, Fennel, And Watercress Salad
instructions: Soak onion in a bowl of ice water 30 minutes; drain.
Toast fennel seeds in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until golden, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and coarsely chop.
Toss onion, fennel bulb, watercress, and vinegar in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper, add oil and fennel seeds, and toss again to coat.

white-pasta-sauce-recipe-comedera.name: White Pasta Sauce Recipe
white-pasta-sauce-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de salsa blanca para pastas

ingredients.item: ½ taza de crema o nata
¼  de taza de queso parmesano

instructions: Calienta a fuego medio una olla mediana o una sartén profunda y derrite la mantequilla lentamente.
Agrega la harina y mezcla bien, cuidando que no se dore mucho.
Agrega la leche y el caldo y mezcla bien para que no queden grumos.
Ahora echa la crema, el queso y la sal y pimienta al gusto.
Deja hervir a fuego suave por 10-15 minutos.
Retira de la hornilla y listo. Ya tienes una sencilla salsa blanca casera para tus pastas.

white-peach-and-bourbon-vanilla-ice-crea.name: White Peach And Bourbon Vanilla Ice-cream

ingredients.item: Vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place the water and sugar in a large saucepan over high heat, bring to the boil and stir until the sugar is dissolved. Add the peaches, cover with a round of non-stick baking paper and weigh down with a small plate to submerge. Reduce the heat to medium and cook for 15–20 minutes or until soft. Drain the peaches, reserving the syrup. Allow to cool slightly before peeling. Refrigerate half the peaches for 1–2 hours or until cold. Cut the remaining peaches in half, discarding the stones, and place in a food processor. Process until smooth and refrigerate until cold.

Place the milk, cream and vanilla in a medium saucepan over high heat and stir until just boiling. Remove from the heat and set aside. Place the egg yolks and extra sugar in a large bowl and whisk until well combined. Gradually pour the milk mixture into the egg mixture, whisking to combine. Return the mixture to the saucepan over low heat and cook, stirring, for 8 minutes or until the custard is thick and coats the back of a spoon. Transfer to a large bowl, cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1–2 hours or until cold.
Add the bourbon and the peach puree to the custard and whisk to combine. Pour into a metal (not glass) brownie pan. Freeze for 8 hours or overnight until set.
Cut the ice-cream into squares. In batches, place the squares in the cleaned food processor and process until smooth. Return the mixture to the tin and freeze for 1 hour or until firm.
Scoop the ice-cream into serving bowls. Drizzle with the reserved peach syrup and sprinkle with the amaretti. Serve with the whole poached peaches.

white-pesto-pasta.name: White Pesto Pasta
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let cool, then finely chop. Bring a large pot of generously salted water to a boil.

Vigorously mix walnuts, ricotta, lemon zest, garlic, oregano, and 2 oz. Parmesan in a large bowl until well combined. Add oil 1 Tbsp. or so at a time, stirring well after each addition, until all the oil is incorporated. Season pesto with salt and pepper.

Cook pasta in pot of boiling water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Scoop 1 cup pasta cooking liquid into bowl with pesto and stir gently to combine (it’s okay if some of the pesto is still in small clumps). Using a spider, tongs, or slotted spoon, transfer pasta directly to bowl with pesto. Mix energetically until pesto thickens enough to lightly coat pasta, about 2 minutes; the pasta should have sauce clinging to it but there should also be some extra sauce that collects in bottom of bowl.
Divide pasta among bowls and serve with more Parmesan alongside for sprinkling over.

white-quinoa-rice-with-mushrooms-lezzet.name: White Quinoa Rice With Mushrooms
instructions: 1. Beyaz kinoayı bir tencereye alın.
2.  Üzerine 5 su bardağı su ilave edin.
3.  Kaynadıktan sonra kısın ateşte ara ara karıştırarak pişirin.
4.  Ayrı bir tencerede yemeklik doğradığınız soğanı pembeleşinceye kadar soteleyin.
5.  Küp doğradığınız kırmızı kapya biberi, ince doğradığınız mantarlar, ezdiğiniz taze sarımsak ve limon suyunu ilave edip 3-4 dakika soteleyin.
6.  Haşlanan YAYLA Beyaz Kinoayı sebzeli karışıma ilave edin.
7.  Tereyağını ilave edip tuz ile tatlandırın ve 4-5 dakika daha sebzelerle birlikte pişirin.
8.  İnce kıydığınız dereotunu ekleyip ocaktan alın.
9.  Ilık servis yapın.

white-raspberry-muffins.name: White Raspberry Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease and flour 12 muffin cups.

Combine 2 cups flour, 1/3 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl. Whisk both amounts of milk with egg in another bowl; stir into flour mixture with 1/4 cup melted butter, 1 teaspoon raspberry extract, and vanilla extract until just moistened. Batter will be lumpy. Fold in raspberries and white chocolate chips; spoon batter into prepared muffin cups.

Mix 5 tablespoons sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, cinnamon, and 1/2 teaspoon raspberry extract in a bowl. Use a pastry cutter to chop 2 tablespoons butter into mixture until it resembles a coarse crumble; sprinkle over muffins.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 18 to 21 minutes.

white-rice.name: White Rice
instructions: Rinse the rice in a sieve three times, or until the water runs clear.
Add the water and salt to a saucepan and bring to a boil over high heat.
Add the rice and stir, letting the water come to a boil again.
Place the lid on the saucepan and lower the heat to a simmer. Simmer for 18 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let the rice steam for 5 minutes.
Fluff the rice with a fork.
Enjoy!

white-rotisserie-chicken-chili.name: White Rotisserie Chicken Chili
instructions: Combine cannellini beans, chicken stock, rotisserie chicken, corn, chiles, chili seasoning, bouillon granules, onion powder, and black pepper in a pot; bring to boil.
Reduce heat; simmer at least 1 hour. Add sour cream during the last 15 minutes of cooking; stir to combine. Garnish with cilantro.

white-russian-cheesecake.name: White Russian Cheesecake

ingredients.prep: such as Nabisco® Famous Chocolate Wafers

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan with 4 layers of aluminum foil; set aside.

Pulse chocolate wafer cookies in a food processor until finely chopped. Add butter, 1 tablespoon sugar, espresso powder, and 1/2 teaspoon salt; pulse until incorporated, about 5 times. Press cookie mixture evenly over bottom and halfway up sides of springform pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until fragrant and starting to turn crispy, 10 to 12 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside to cool while you prepare cheesecake filling. Decrease oven temperature to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Combine cream cheese and remaining 1 1/3 cups sugar in the bowl of an electric stand-mixer fitted with the paddle attachment. Beat on medium-high speed until completely smooth and creamy, 1 to 2 minutes, scraping down sides as necessary. Add melted chocolate and beat until incorporated, about 30 seconds. Add sour cream and beat until combined, about 30 seconds. Add coffee liqueur, Irish cream liqueur, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt; beat on medium until combined, about 1 minute. Add eggs, 1 at a time, and beat on low until just incorporated. Pour cheesecake mixture into the cooled crust. Place the springform pan into a large roasting pan.

Place roasting pan on center rack in the oven. Carefully pour boiling water into the roasting pan to come 1 inch up the sides of the springform pan, making sure you do not get any water into the cheesecake.

Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set but still slightly jiggly in the center, 60 to 65 minutes. Turn oven off and prop open door. Let cheesecake cool in oven for 1 hour. Remove roasting pan with cheesecake from oven. Remove cheesecake from roasting pan and set aside to cool completely, about 45 minutes. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 4 hours, up to overnight.

Run a sharp paring knife around edges of crust to loosen from pan. Remove sides of springform pan. Run knife around bottom of cheesecake to loosen. Gently shimmy, or use large spatulas, to transfer cheesecake onto a cake stand or serving plate. Top with white chocolate curls. Slice and serve cold or at room temperature.

white-russian-cocktail.name: White Russian Cocktail
instructions: Fill an old-fashioned glass with ice.
Pour in vodka and coffee liqueur. Top off with cream.
Serve and enjoy!

white-russian-pudding-shot.name: White Russian Pudding Shot

ingredients.item: Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Beat milk and pudding mix together in a bowl using an electric mixer until pudding is thickened. Stir vodka and coffee-flavored liqueur into pudding; fold in whipped topping. Pipe or spoon pudding mixture into shot glasses. Freeze until ready to serve.

white-russian-recipe-intense-and-sweet-c.name: White Russian Recipe, Intense And Sweet
white-russian-recipe-intense-and-sweet-c.original_name: Receta de White Russian, intenso y dulzón

ingredients.item: 15 ml de nata o crema de leche

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestro cóctel, colocando el vodka en una coctelera o recipiente con tapa. Luego, añadirás el licor de café y lo vas a mezclar.
Agrega unos cubos de hielo en tu vaso a las rocas, y vas a verter la mezcla del licor de café con el vodka.
Es el turno de la crema de leche o nata. Te dejo un truco que es montarla por 2 minutos a velocidad suave con la batidora para que tome espesor.
Cuando esté densa, toma una cuchara y la irás incorporando poco a poco a la mezcla de licor de café con vodka.
Hago la crema de leche o nata así, ya que si la agregamos de golpe y muy líquida se irá toda al fondo y no es la idea.
Ahora sí, puedes degustar de tu cóctel White Russian.

white-sangria.name: White Sangria
instructions: Combine first 5 ingredients in a large pitcher. Mash fruits gently with the back of a wooden spoon to release their juices. Add wine and stir to combine. Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours and up to 48 hours (the longer it sits, the fruitier it will be). Divide among ice-filled wineglasses.

white-sangria-with-berries.name: White Sangria With Berries
instructions: Mix wine, brandy, and schnapps together in a large pitcher.
Slice strawberries, raspberries, and peaches into medium chunks. Add to the wine mixture. Chill for a minimum of 3 to 4 hours.
Pour in seltzer just prior to serving. Serve over ice with fruit added from the pitcher.

white-sauce.name: White Sauce
instructions: Purée cream, basil, fennel, chives, lemon zest, lemon juice, garlic, and red pepper flakes in a food processor or with an immersion blender until thick and creamy, 15–30 seconds; season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Cream can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

white-shrimp-feijoada-with-sausage-telec.name: White Shrimp Feijoada With Sausage
white-shrimp-feijoada-with-sausage-telec.original_name: Feijoada branca de camarão com linguiça
instructions: Descasque as cebolas, corte-as em meias-luas e aloure-as num tacho com o azeite. Adicione a linguiça, cortada em rodelas, deixe cozinhar mais um pouco e, depois, acrescente o miolo de camarão. Regue com o vinho do porto e mexa.
Junte o feijão escorrido e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando. Se necessário, adicione um pouco de água. Quase no final, tempere com sal e pimenta, junte a salsa picada e deixe apurar. Sirva de seguida.

white-skillet-pizza-with-spring-greens-a.name: White Skillet Pizza With Spring Greens And An Egg

ingredients.item: Young broccoli rabe (about half a bunch)
ingredients.prep: trimmed, divided, or 3 cups torn Tuscan kale or Swiss chard

instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven; preheat to 500°. Place a 12" cast-iron skillet in oven and preheat 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix garlic and oil in a small bowl. Mix mozzarella and Fontina in a medium bowl.
Using lightly floured hands, stretch 1 piece of dough out on a lightly floured surface to an 11" round.

Remove skillet from oven and sprinkle pan with cornmeal (enough to cover most of the surface). Carefully set dough snugly in pan; it’s okay if some of the dough overlaps. Brush dough with garlic-oil (you won’t need all of it); season with salt and pepper. Top dough with 2 cups cheese mixture, half of spring onions, half of broccoli rabe, and 4 anchovies, if using. Top with another ½ cup cheese mixture; season with more pepper.

Bake pizza until crust is beginning to turn golden and cheese is melted, 6–8 minutes. Crack 1 egg into center of pizza; season with salt. Continue to bake until whites are just set and crust is golden brown, 5–6 minutes.

Transfer pizza to a cutting board and brush edges with more garlic-oil (reserve remaining garlic-oil for second pizza). Top pizza with Parmesan and half of oregano. Using a microplane, grate a little bit of lemon zest over top of pie.
Sprinkle cast-iron pan with cornmeal and make a second pizza with remaining dough and toppings.

white-soup-lezzet.name: White Soup
instructions: 1. Pirinci bol suyla yıkayıp süzün.
2.  Geniş bir tencereye alıp 4 bardak su ve bir tutam tuz ilave ederek yarım saat haşlayın.
3.  Pirinçler haşlanırken çorbanın terbiyesi için, bir kaseye önce yumurta ile unu alıp, sonra yoğurdu ekleyip iyice çırpın.
4.  Karışımı 2 çorba kaşığı suyla inceltip azar azar çorbaya ilave edin.
5.  Sürekli karıştırarak kısık ateşte 15 dakika daha pişirin.
6.  Tereyağını tavada eritip tarhunu ekleyin.
7.  Çorbaya ilave edip 1-2 dakika daha pişirin.
8.  Çorbayı servis kaselerine alın.
9.  Taze çekilmiş karabiber ekleyip rendelenmiş havuçla süsleyerek sıcak servis yapın.

white-stew-lezzet.name: White Stew
instructions: 1. Kemikli kuzu etini bir tencereye alın.
2.  Üzerini örtecek kadar su ekleyin.
3.  Tuz, temizlenmiş havuç, defne yaprağı ve karanfilli ilave edip 1 saat orta ateşte kaynatın.
4.  Oluşan köpüğü kevgirle üzerinden alın.
5.  Etleri kemiklerinden ayırıp eti kuşbaşı büyüklüğünde parçalara bölün.
6.  Soğanları soyup halka şeklinde doğrayın.
7.  Margarini başka bir tencerede eritin.
8.  Etleri ilave edip 3-4 dakika kavurun.
9.  Haşlama suyundan 2 su bardağı et suyu ve nohutları ekleyip pişirin.
10. Pişmeye yakın, limon, un ve yumurtayı bir kapta iyice çırpın.
11.  Üzerine et suyundan ilave edip yemekle karıştırın.
12.  Pide parçalarını tavada kızartın.
13.  Üzerlerine eti yerleştirip suyunu gezdirin.
14.  Kıyılmış maydanoz serpip servis yapın.

white-stock.name: White Stock
instructions: Cut veal from bone.
Combine water, veal meat, veal bone, chicken, vegetables, and salt in a stock pot. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 5 hours.
Strain stock, and let cool. Discard vegetables and bones, use veal and chicken as desired.

white-sweet-potato-crisps-with-ricotta-a.name: White Sweet Potato Crisps With Ricotta And Scallion

ingredients.prep: peeled, very thinly shaved lengthwise on a mandoline
green parts only, thinly sliced on a steep diagonal

instructions: Mix ricotta and lemon juice in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper; set aside.

Lightly brush a large cast-iron skillet with vegetable oil and heat over high. Working in batches, arrange sweet potato slices in a single layer in skillet and cook, turning once, until charred in most spots and crisp, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl. Drizzle lightly with oil; season with salt.
Serve sweet potato crisps topped with lemon ricotta and scallions.

white-sweet-potatoes-with-mirin-and-hone.name: White Sweet Potatoes With Mirin And Honey
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Place a well- seasoned 8"–10" cast-iron skillet in oven.

Pierce potatoes in several spots with a fork. Microwave sweet potatoes on high for 5 minutes. (Alternatively, wrap sweet potatoes in foil and bake at 450° until tender around edges but still hard in center, 30–35 minutes.) Transfer potatoes to a large bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Let sit for 5 minutes.
Whisk mirin, honey, vinegar, and salt in a medium bowl. Peel sweet potatoes and cut crosswise into 1"–1 1/2"-thick rounds. Add to mirin mixture; toss to coat.

Using oven mitts, carefully remove heated skillet from oven; add oil and swirl pan to coat. Add sweet potatoes and mirin mixture to skillet, arranging potatoes cut side down. Bake until sweet potatoes are caramelized on one side, 15–20 minutes. Turn sweet potatoes, rotating them around pan to avoid hot spots, and cook until tender and caramelized, 5–7 minutes longer.
Transfer sweet potatoes to a platter. Add 2 Tbsp. water to skillet, scraping up browned bits. Add butter, swirling pan to melt and combine. Pour sauce over sweet potatoes. Season with salt.

white-veal-roasted-in-the-oven-teleculin.name: White Veal Roasted In The Oven

ingredients.item: Rodelas de limão (raminhos de tomilho e mistura de pimentas esmagadas para decorar)

instructions: Coloque a carne num recipiente de forno e tempere com o sumo e a raspa do limão, os dentes de alho picados, tomilho a gosto, sal, pimenta, o azeite e a banha. Misture tudo muito bem.

Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 200ºC, durante 35 a 40 minutos ou até que a carne fique bem assada. Retire, decore com rodelas de limão, raminhos de tomilho e mistura de pimentas esmagadas e sirva com batatas a murro.

white-wine-spritzer.name: White Wine Spritzer
instructions: Pour wine into glasses, and top off with club soda. Serve immediately.

white-winebraised-chicken.name: White Wine–braised Chicken

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Heat oil in a Dutch oven or other heavy-lidded pot over medium-high heat. Season chicken with salt and pepper and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes per side; transfer to a plate.

Add shallots and garlic to pot and cook, stirring often, until beginning to soften, about 2 minutes. Add thyme and white wine; bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until reduced by ⅔, about 4 minutes.

Return chicken, skin side up, to pot; add broth, bring to a simmer, cover, and transfer to oven. Braise until chicken is cooked through and tender, 20–25 minutes. Uncover; continue to cook in oven until skin begins to crisp, 8–10 minutes longer.

white-chocolate-dipped-strawberries-with.name: White-chocolate-dipped Strawberries With Citrus Sugar
instructions: Line baking sheet with foil. Using fingertips, mix sugar and citrus peels in small bowl until sugar is moist. Stir chocolate in small bowl set over saucepan of barely simmering water until melted and smooth. Remove from over water.

Holding 1 strawberry by stem end, dip 2/3 of berry into chocolate; shake excess back into bowl. Turn berry dipped end up and sprinkle with citrus sugar. Place on prepared sheet. Repeat with remaining berries, chocolate, and sugar. Chill until chocolate sets, about 30 minutes.

who-hash.name: Who-hash

ingredients.item: Fully cooked luncheon meat (such as spam®)

instructions: Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Spread potatoes and meat in a single layer in the skillet; cook until browned on the bottom, about 5 minutes. Turn potatoes and meat; cook until the other side is browned, about 5 minutes. Add onion; cook and stir until tender, 5 to 7 minutes.

whole-chicken-in-a-pan.name: Whole Chicken In A Pan

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place the chicken breast-side down on a cutting board. With a poultry shears or sharp knife, make two vertical cuts about 1 1/2 inch apart on each side of the backbone, all the way from the neck to the tail. Cut through the bones, and remove the backbone and tail. Open up the chicken so it lays flat.

With the chicken still breast side down, use your sharp knife to slice through the cartilage at the top of the breast bone, working from the inside of the chicken. Hold the chicken in your two hands, and bend it backwards to make the breastbone pop out; pull out the breastbone and the cartilage. Use your knife to slice out the ribs from the inside, if you desire. Try not to cut through the skin.
In a small bowl, mix the sage, salt, and black pepper. Use your fingers to rub the sage mixture all over the inside and outside of the chicken, and push the seasonings under the skin as well.

Melt butter with olive oil in a 12-inch heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Have a second heavy skillet (such as a cast-iron skillet) or a heavy Dutch oven ready for flattening the chicken. (If you don't have either of those things, wrap a brick in aluminum foil.) When the oil and butter just begin to give off wisps of smoke, place the chicken into the skillet, skin side down and flat. The 'knees' of the chicken legs should point towards each other so the legs are flat. Place a piece of aluminum foil on top of the chicken, and weight it down with the heavy skillet or Dutch oven to press the chicken down as it cooks.

Cook the chicken until the skin is crisp and browned, 12 to 15 minutes; carefully remove the weight and foil, and turn the chicken over so the opened-up side is down. Replace the foil and weight, and cook the chicken until the juices run clear and the meat is no longer pink at the bone, about 15 more minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into thigh meat, not touching bone, should read at least 71°C (70 degrees C).

whole-chicken-in-the-airfryer-argiro.name: Whole Chicken In The Airfryer
instructions: Αφήνουμε το κοτόπουλο να έρθει σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου. Μπορούμε να το ψήσουμε ολόκληρο ή να το κόψουμε σε μερίδες για πιο γρήγορο ψήσιμο.

Καθαρίζουμε τις πατάτες και τις κόβουμε σε μικρά καρέ. Τις βάζουμε σε ένα μπολ και προσθέτουμε: αλάτι, πιπέρι, αποξηραμένη ρίγανη, τη μισή ποσότητα πάπρικας, μουστάρδα, χυμό από μισό λεμόνι και 2 κ.σ. ελαιόλαδο
Ανακατεύουμε καλά και τις τοποθετούμε στον κάδο του air fryer σε μονή στρώση, χρησιμοποιώντας πρώτα θήκη ψησίματος.

whole-chicken-in-the-shell-argiro.name: Whole Chicken In The Shell

ingredients.item: 2 κλων.φρέσκο θυμάρι ή συνδυασμό μυρωδικών (ρίγανη -  δεντρολίβανο)
2 κλων.φρέσκο θυμάρι ή συνδυασμό μυρωδικών (ρίγανη -  δεντρολίβανο)

instructions: Αφήνουμε πρώτα το πουλερικό να έρθει σε θερμοκρασία δωματίου, τουλάχιστον για 30′. Το σκουπίζουμε πολύ καλά με απορροφητικό χαρτί.
Ανάβουμε τον φούρνο στους 200°C (στις αντιστάσεις).
Αλατοπιπερώνουμε μέσα το κοτόπουλο.
Σε μπολ διαλύουμε το μέλι στα υγρά (βαλσάμικο, σόγια, χυμό λεμόνι, χυμό πορτοκάλι, ελαιόλαδο) και τα χτυπάμε με πιρούνι να ενωθούν.
Γεμίζουμε την κοιλιά του κοτόπουλου με το σκόρδο, τις λεμονόκουπες και τις πορτοκαλόκουπες καθώς και με τα μυρωδικά, δένουμε το κοτόπουλο και το βάζουμε σε μικρή γάστρα.
Το αλείφουμε με ελάχιστο ελαιόλαδο.

Το αλατοπιπερώνουμε, το περιχύνουμε με τη γλυκόξινη σάλτσα, το σκεπάζουμε και το ψήνουμε για 1 ώρα και 30′. Τότε το ελέγχουμε, το ξεσκεπάζουμε και το αφήνουμε λίγο να ροδίσει καλά και να κάνει ωραία κρούστα.
Αφού ψηθεί το κοτόπουλο, ελέγχουμε με την λάμα του μαχαιριού το μπούτι (αν βγάζει διάφανο υγρό είναι ψημένο, αν βγάζει ροζ θέλει λίγη ώρα επιπλέον ψήσιμο).

Βγάζουμε το κοτόπουλο σε πιατέλα. Αν θέλουμε αφαιρούμε με κουτάλι το περισσότερο λίπος της σάλτσας από την επιφάνεια και την βράζουμε σε κατσαρόλα λίγα λεπτά σε δυνατή φωτιά να γλασάρει και να κάνει χοντρές φουσκάλες.

whole-chicken-pie.name: Whole Chicken Pie

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine onion, carrot, and celery in a bowl. Add garlic, rosemary, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper. Drizzle in olive oil. Mix stuffing well.

Trim away the wing tips of the chicken. Season the whole surface and cavity generously with salt. Spoon the stuffing into the cavity, reserving any extra for the sauce later. Tie the legs together with string. Refrigerate until ready to wrap.

Place dough onto a well floured surface. Sprinkle more flour on top. Roll out into a large circle about 1/8 inch thick. Place chicken, breast-side down, in the center of the dough. Wrap dough over the chicken. Cut off sections of excess dough and patch them over areas with less coverage.

Beat egg and water together and brush some egg wash over the redistributed dough. Press the rest of dough into the new seams. Continue folding dough over the chicken, brushing with egg wash and patching pieces together as needed, until chicken is fully covered. Do not stretch the dough too thin.
Flip chicken over onto a baking sheet lined with a silicone mat. Press on the inside of both legs to enhance their shape. Refrigerate until crust is cold, about 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Brush the remaining egg wash all over the chicken. Sprinkle fleur de sel on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is beautifully browned, about 1 hour and 10 minutes. Transfer chicken to a pie dish and let rest while preparing the sauce, 30 minutes to 1 hour.

Cut a small hole into the back of the chicken and spoon out 1/2 cup of the stuffing. Place in a saucepan with 1 tablespoon butter. Add a pinch of salt. Cook and stir over medium-high heat until vegetables are tender, about 3 minutes. Add wine and the pan drippings. Cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced by half, about 4 minutes. Add cold butter. Turn off heat and stir sauce vigorously until butter melts.
Slice chicken and serve with the sauce.

whole-corn-on-the-grill.name: Whole Corn On The Grill

ingredients.item: Charred spring onion and sesame-chile butter

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium heat.
Grill corn, rotating occasionally, until husks are blackened (some will flake and fall off) and kernels are tender with some browned and charred spots, 25–35 minutes.
Let corn cool slightly, then shuck.
Serve with Charred Spring Onion and Sesame-Chile Butter.

whole-fish-ssam.name: Whole Fish Ssam

ingredients.item: 0.5–3-lb. head-on whole white fish (such as branzino

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced on a diagonal, divided
cooked white rice, and lettuce (for serving)

instructions: Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper and coat evenly with 1 Tbsp. oil. Place rack in middle and top third of oven and set baking sheet on middle rack. Preheat oven to 375°.

Whisk egg white, a pinch of salt, and 1 tsp. water in a small bowl until frothy. Pat fish dry inside and out with paper towels. Season fish all over, including cavity, with salt. Stuff cavity with one fourth of scallions, half of sliced garlic, and half of chiles.

Place fish on a large plate or another rimmed baking sheet, brush with egg white mixture, and sprinkle with 2 Tbsp. sesame seeds, patting gently to adhere. Turn over and repeat on opposite side, with egg white and another 2 Tbsp. sesame seeds. Transfer fish to preheated baking sheet, drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil, and season with more salt. Bake until mostly cooked through and the tip of a paring knife easily slides through flesh, 20–25 minutes.

Meanwhile, toast remaining 2 tsp. sesame seeds in a small skillet over medium-high heat until golden and fragrant, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl and add doenjang, gochujang, honey, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil. Finely grate in 1 garlic clove and whisk to combine. (This is your ssamjang.)
Whisk vinegar and 2 Tbsp. ssamjang in a large bowl. Add radishes and remaining sliced scallions, garlic, and chiles. Toss to combine.

Remove fish from oven; heat broiler. Broil fish on top rack until sesame seeds are golden, about 4 minutes. Remove fish from oven and gently turn over by sliding fish to one side of baking sheet and using parchment and a fish spatula to turn it. Season other side of fish with more salt and broil until sesame seeds are golden, about 3 minutes. Transfer fish to a platter and serve with ssamjang, radish salad, kimchi, cooked rice, and lettuce for making wraps.

whole-grain-breakfast-cookies.name: Whole Grain Breakfast Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line baking sheets with parchment paper.
Pulse walnuts in the bowl of a food processor until ground into a flour; transfer to a bowl. Stir in oats, flax meal, whole wheat flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt until thoroughly combined.

Combine almond butter, brown sugar, canola oil, agave nectar, egg, and vanilla extract in the bowl of a food processor; pulse to blend well. Transfer almond butter mixture to a large bowl; fold in chocolate chips and dried cherries. Stir oatmeal mixture into almond butter mixture; dough will be very thick.
Scoop dough by heaping teaspoons; roll into balls and place on the prepared baking sheets, about 2 inches apart.

Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from the oven; flatten cookies with a spatula. Cool on the baking sheets for about 5 minutes before transferring to wire racks to finish cooling.

whole-grain-loaf-of-bread-lezzet.name: Whole Grain Loaf Of Bread
instructions: 1. Tereyağı, bal ve suyu küçük bir tencereye alın ve ısıtın.
2.  Bir kenara alıp ılınmasını bekleyin.
3.  Derin bir kasenin içine unları, mayayı ve tuzu koyup harmanlayın.
4.  Ilınmış olan ballı, tereyağlı suyu ilave edip 10 dakika yoğurun.
5.  Yağlanmış temiz bir kaba alıp üzerini streç film ile kapatın ve Ilık bir ortamda 2 saat mayalanmaya bırakın.
6.  Fırını 220 dereceye ayarlayın.
7.  Fırın tepsisini unlayın.
8.  Hamur mayalandıktan sonra havasını almak için tekrar hafifçe yoğurun.
9.  Hamuru biri büyük biri küçük olmak üzere iki parçaya bölün.
10.  Elinizle yuvarlayın ve büyük olan parçayı tepsiye koyun üzerini hafifçe bastırın.
11.  Diğer küçük parçayı da yuvarlayıp büyük parçanın üzerine yapıştırın ve mayalanmaya bırakın.
12.  Mayalandıktan sonra üzerine çırpılmış yumurta sürün.
13.  Susam, keten tohumu ve ay çekirdeği tanelerini serpiştirin.
14.  Önceden ısıtılmış 220 derece fırında 45 dakika pişirin daha sonra fırın ısısını 180 dereceye düşürün ve 20 dakika daha pişirmeye devam edin.
15.  Fırından çıkarıp 30 dakika dinlendirin ve dilimleyerek servis yapın.

whole-grain-mustard-walnut-vinaigrette.name: Whole Grain Mustard Walnut Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground pepper

instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together Dijon and whole grain mustards, vinegar, olive oil, and walnut oil; season with salt and pepper. Alternatively, place ingredients in a 1-pint jar with a lid and shake vigorously to combine. Refrigerate until ready to use.

whole-grain-pancakes.name: Whole Grain Pancakes

ingredients.prep: such as barley, farro, rye, spelt, kamut, and/or quinoa

ingredients.item: Sliced peaches or other stone fruit and pure maple syrup

instructions: Whisk flours, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl. Whisk egg and buttermilk in a medium bowl. Using a few swift strokes, whisk egg mixture into dry ingredients until combined. Stir in grains (note: you can pulse the grains in a food processor if you’d prefer them in smaller pieces).

Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Lightly brush with butter. Add half of batter to skillet, spreading into an even layer as wide as the skillet. Cook pancake until bubbles have formed and broken across entire surface and underside is golden brown, 4–5 minutes. Using 2 spatulas (or sliding onto a flat plate before inverting back into skillet), flip pancake. Continue to cook until lightly browned underneath, about 1 minute.
Transfer pancake to a plate, then repeat with remaining batter. Serve pancakes topped with sliced fruit and syrup.

whole-grain-pancakes-with-blackberries.name: Whole Grain Pancakes With Blackberries

ingredients.item: Mixed cooked whole grains (such as barley
ingredients.prep: farro, rye, spelt, kamut, and/or quinoa)
fresh blackberries, and pure maple syrup (for serving)

instructions: Whisk whole wheat and all-purpose flours, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl. Whisk egg and buttermilk in a medium bowl just to incorporate. Using a few swift strokes, whisk egg mixture into dry ingredients just to combine. Stir grains into batter (you can pulse the grains in a food processor first if you prefer them in smaller pieces).

Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Lightly brush with butter. Add half of batter to skillet, spreading into an even layer as wide as the skillet. Cook pancake until bubbles have formed and broken across the entire surface and underside is golden brown, about 5 minutes. Using 2 spatulas (or sliding onto a flat plate before inverting back into skillet), flip pancake. Continue to cook until lightly browned underneath, about 1 minute. Transfer pancake to a plate. Repeat with remaining batter.

Serve pancakes topped with butter, fruit, and syrup.
Read More: The 29 New Essential Recipes from the Bon Appétit Test Kitchen

whole-grain-pasta-with-grilled-chicken-a.name: Whole Grain Pasta With Grilled Chicken And Butternut Squash

ingredients.item: Sea salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Combine squash, 2 tablespoons olive oil, rosemary, sage, thyme, oregano, basil, sea salt, and pepper in a large bowl; toss until squash is coated with herbs. Transfer to a sheet pan.
Place in the preheated oven and cook until squash pieces turn golden brown on the bottom, 15 to 20 minutes. Remove from oven, flip with spatula, and cook until tender, 15 to 20 more minutes.
While squash is cooking, preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Brush chicken with remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil and season with sea salt and pepper.

Cook chicken on the preheated grill until no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, 3 to 4 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C). Remove to a plate and cut into thin slices.

While chicken is cooking, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add penne and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 11 minutes. Drain pasta and transfer to a large bowl. Top with roasted butternut squash and all oil and herbs from the sheet pan. Add chicken slices and sprinkle with Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese. Drizzle with remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil if pasta seems dry.

whole-grain-salad-with-jammy-eggs-and-sh.name: Whole Grain Salad With Jammy Eggs And Shallot Yogurt
instructions: Cook rye berries in a large saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, 60–80 minutes. Drain and let cool.
Meanwhile, mix shallot, yogurt, mint, and 1 Tbsp. lemon juice in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Toss greens with a squeeze of lemon juice in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add rye berries and toss to combine.
Scoop shallot yogurt onto plate and top with a mess of salad and egg halves.

whole-grain-shortbread-with-einkorn-and-.name: Whole Grain Shortbread With Einkorn And Rye Flour
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C. Butter a 6 by 10 in. baking dish.

Place the butter in a mixing bowl. The butter must be very soft—the consistency of mayonnaise or whipped cream. Add the salt to the butter and mix well. Sift the flours and cornstarch together into another bowl. Add the granulated sugar to the butter and mix just until combined. Add the flour mixture and mix just until a smooth dough forms.

Pat the dough evenly into the prepared baking dish. The dough should be no more than 2/3 in. deep. Bake until the top and bottom are lightly browned, about 30 minutes. The middle of the shortbread should remain light. Let cool on a wire rack until warm to the touch.

Sprinkle the shortbread with the superfine sugar. Tilt the dish so that the sugar fully and evenly coats the surface and then tip out the excess sugar. With a very thin, sharp knife, cut the shortbread into rectangular fingers about 1/2 in. wide and 2 in. long. If the cookies have become cold they will not slice well, so they must still be warm to the touch at this point. Chill thoroughly before removing from the baking dish.

The first cookie is difficult to remove, but the rest should come out easily with the aid of a small, thin offset spatula. The cookies will keep in an airtight container in a cool place for up to 2 weeks.

Skip sprinkling the shortbread with sugar. Temper 8 oz. milk, dark, or white chocolate. Dip half of the cookie in the melted chocolate, letting excess chocolate drip back into the bowl, and let set. Alternatively, you can use melted, untempered chocolate, but refrigerate the cookies after dipping to set the chocolate.

whole-grain-waffles.name: Whole Grain Waffles
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, oil, applesauce, and vanilla. Beat in whole wheat pastry flour, flax seed meal, wheat germ, all-purpose flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt until batter is smooth.
Preheat a waffle iron, and coat with cooking spray. Pour batter into waffle iron in batches, and cook until crisp and golden brown.

whole-grilled-fish-with-lime.name: Whole Grilled Fish With Lime

ingredients.prep: two 2 1/2-pound, or three 1 1/2-pound head-on fish, such as gray or pink snapper, black sea bass, or branzino, scaled, gutted

ingredients.item: Olive oil plus more for oiling and drizzling
Limes or 5 key limes (preferably from mexico)
ingredients.prep: thinly sliced, plus 1/4 cup fresh lime juice

instructions: Build a medium-hot fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to high. Score fish: Cut 1 slash lengthwise down to the bone, then crosswise in 2 places, spacing apart; repeat on other side. Season fish cavity and skin with salt; drizzle fish with 1/4 cup oil. Stuff some of the lime slices (reserve a few for garnish) and herb stems inside fish.

Clean and oil grill grate well. Grill fish, resisting the urge to turn it, until skin is nicely crisp and charred and flesh is flaky and opaque down to the bone. (This can take 6–15 minutes, depending on size of fish. Don't mess around with it until it's ready.) Place a metal spatula underneath fish (a pair of metal tongs on top of fish also helps for support), then lift and gently roll over to the other side. Cook until flesh is flaky and opaque down to the bone, 6–15 minutes. Use a small knife to check for doneness; if it slides easily through the thickest part of flesh, fish is done. If not, finish cooking fish on grill or in a 450° oven.
Place fish on a serving platter; drizzle oil and lime juice over. Garnish with reserved lime slices, basil leaves, and cilantro.

whole-grilled-salmon-with-chanterelles.name: Whole Grilled Salmon With Chanterelles

ingredients.item: Chanterelle mushrooms or other wild mushrooms

ingredients.prep: preferably sockeye or coho, cleaned, scales removed

instructions: Heat a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Add butter and oil and swirl pan until butter is melted. Add mushrooms, thyme, and garlic and season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing often, until mushrooms are golden brown and tender, 5–8 minutes; set aside.

Prepare a grill for medium-low heat. Using a sharp knife, make a slit along belly of salmon, running from rib cage to tail. Turn salmon on its back and cut along both sides of backbone without piercing through skin on other side. Carefully remove backbone without tearing skin, then remove pin bones with small needle-nose pliers or tweezers. Season inside of fish with salt and pepper and stuff lemon slices, dill, thyme, and tarragon inside cavity. Tie wet kitchen twine around fish in several places to secure. Place on a rimmed baking sheet; rub skin all over with oil.

Carefully place fish on grill grates and grill, uncovered, until flesh on bottom side is mostly opaque but still slightly translucent in the center, 12–18 minutes. Carefully turn fish and cook on the other side to the same doneness, 8–10 minutes. Transfer fish to a clean rimmed baking sheet and let rest at least 10 minutes.

Place skillet with chanterelles directly on edge of grill to reheat while you portion the fish. Remove strings and peel back skin from salmon; discard. Break flesh of top fillet into large pieces and transfer to a platter. Discard aromatics and remove skin from bottom fillet, break up, and transfer to platter. Season with more salt and pepper and spoon warm chanterelles over.

whole-orange-cake-teleculinaria.name: Whole Orange Cake

ingredients.item: 1 colher (sobremesa) bem cheia  fermento em pó

instructions: Unte uma forma com manteiga e polvilhe-a com farinha.
Coloque o açúcar, a manteiga, a laranja, previamente lavada e cortada em pedaços, e os ovos num liquidificador, bata tudo muito bem, depois junte o fermento e a farinha e volte a bater.
Deite a massa na forma e leve-a ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, durante cerca de 30 a 35 minutos. Desenforme, deixe arrefecer e sirva polvilhado com açúcar em pó.

whole-plant-chopped-salad.name: Whole Plant Chopped Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine lettuce, cucumber, carrot, green onions, cauliflower, bell pepper, sunflower seeds, celery, and parsley in a large bowl.
Drizzle with dressing; season with salt and black pepper.

whole-poached-salmon.name: Whole Poached Salmon
instructions: Combine wine, onion, celery, peppercorns, and bay leaf in a fish poacher. Place poacher over 2 burners on the stove.
Rinse fish under cold water, stuff the cavity with dill and lemon slices, and place on the rack in the pot. Cover and bring slowly to a strong simmer (don't boil at any point).
Cook until fish easily flakes with a fork, being sure not to overcook, about 20 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 60°C (60 degrees C).
Drain and serve.

whole-roasted-cauliflower-salad.name: Whole Roasted Cauliflower Salad

ingredients.prep: finely grated (about  0.25 cup), plus 3 ounces cut into  0.25-inch cubes

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Place cauliflower on a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet. Blend onion, garlic, basil, curry powder, cayenne, grated Parmesan, ¼ cup oil, ¼ cup parsley, 2 Tbsp. mint, 1 Tbsp. lemon juice, and ¾ tsp. sugar in a blender until smooth. Slather onion purée over cauliflower so it covers the entire surface in a thick layer; season generously with salt. Roast cauliflower until florets are tender and browned but stem is still firm and crunchy, 40–45 minutes. To test for doneness, stick a skewer into the center of head—it should encounter some resistance at the core. Let cool.
Meanwhile, toss raisins, 3 Tbsp. lemon juice, and a pinch each of salt and sugar in a small bowl. Let sit until raisins rehydrate and are plump, 10–15 minutes.
Process feta in a food processor in long pulses, thinning with brine as needed, until feta is smooth and the consistency of Greek yogurt.

Transfer cauliflower to a cutting board and cut into ½" pieces. Transfer to a large bowl and add almonds, cubed Parmesan, and raisins with their soaking liquid. Drizzle with oil, season with salt, and toss to combine. Taste and season with more salt and lemon juice, if needed. Fold in half of scallions and half of cilantro.
Spread feta across bottom of a large platter and mound cauliflower mixture over. Top with remaining scallions, remaining cilantro, and more parsley and mint. Drizzle with a little more oil.

whole-roasted-cauliflower-with-curry-tah.name: Whole Roasted Cauliflower With Curry Tahini Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
Set a steamer basket over 1-inch of boiling water in a large pot. Add cauliflower, cover, and reduce heat to a simmer. Steam cauliflower until just tender when pierced with a knife, about 20 minutes.
Melt 4 tablespoons of butter. Whisk 1 tablespoon of curry seasoning into the melted butter.

Using 2 slotted spoons or a mesh spider, lift cauliflower from steamer basket, leaving water in basket, and transfer cauliflower to a 9-inch pie dish. Season with salt and brush the curry butter all over. Roast, rotating the dish halfway through, until golden, about 40 minutes.
Meanwhile, using a food processor or whisk, blend the tahini with the cold water, lime juice, garlic and curry powder until combined and lightly whipped. Season with salt and pepper.
Season cauliflower with flaky sea salt and serve with tahini sauce.

whole-roasted-cauliflower-with-whipped-g.name: Whole Roasted Cauliflower With Whipped Goat Cheese

ingredients.item: Olive oil plus more for serving

instructions: Preheat oven to 475°. Bring wine, oil, kosher salt, juice, butter, red pepper flakes, sugar, bay leaf, and 8 cups water to a boil in a large pot. Add cauliflower, reduce heat, and simmer, turning occasionally, until a knife easily inserts into center, 15-20 minutes.
Using 2 slotted spoons or a mesh spider, transfer cauliflower to a rimmed baking sheet, draining well. Roast, rotating sheet halfway through, until brown all over, 30-40 minutes.

While cauliflower is roasting, blend goat cheese, cream cheese, feta, cream, and 2 tablespoons oil in a food processor until smooth; season with sea salt. Transfer whipped goat cheese to a serving bowl and drizzle with oil.
Transfer cauliflower to a plate. Drizzle with oil; sprinkle with sea salt. Serve with whipped goat cheese.
DO AHEAD: Whipped goat cheese can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill.

whole-snapper.name: Whole Snapper

ingredients.prep: peeled and chopped, plus 4 cloves whole garlic, peeled
cleaned, with head and tail intact

ingredients.item: Juice of 10 key limes or small thin-skinned limes
ingredients.prep: plus 4 limes cut into quarters for serving

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C.

In a large sauté pan over moderate heat, warm the oil. Add the onions and sauté, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes. Add the chopped garlic and sauté, stirring occasionally, for 1 minute. Add 3/4 cup wine and the bay leaves and bring to a simmer. Continue simmering until the onions are tender and the wine is slightly reduced, about 3 minutes. Whisk in the butter then remove the pan from the heat and whisk in the lemon juice.

Arrange the snappers, side by side, in a 12- by 18-inch or larger roasting pan. Stuff the cavity of each fish with about 1/4 cup of the onion mixture, along with the whole garlic, tomato slices, and celery. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Spoon the remaining onion mixture over the fish then pour half the lime juice on and around the fish and add 2 cups of water to the pan. Wrap the pan snugly with foil and roast for 25 minutes. Remove the foil and continue roasting until the fish is cooked through, 20 to 25 minutes longer. Remove any onion from the top of the fish then carefully transfer the fish to a large serving platter (do not discard the onion or juices remaining in the pan). Drizzle the remaining lime juice over the fish and cover loosely with foil to keep warm.

Scrape the onion and juices from the roasting pan into a medium saucepan. Add the remaining 1/4 cup white wine and 1/4 cup water, and bring to a simmer. Continue simmering until slightly reduced, then pour through a fine-mesh strainer.
Garnish the fish with cilantro and serve with the reduced pan sauce and lime wedges.

whole-stuffed-cabbage-lezzet.name: Whole Stuffed Cabbage
instructions: 1. Lahananın içini temizleyip oyun.
2.  Soğanları  yemeklik doğrayıp bir tavaya alın.
3.  2 yemek kaşığı yağ ve dolmalık fıstıkları ekleyip  birlikte yumuşayana kadar kavurun.
4.  Ocaktan alıp soğumaya bırakın.
5. Pirinci ve kuş üzümlerini ayrı kaplarda sıcak suda bekletin.
6.  Pirinci beklettikten sonra akan suyun altında yıkayıp süzün.
7. İç malzemesi için kıymayı karıştırma kabına alın.
8.  Önceden kavurduğunuz soğan ile dolmalık fıstıkları, tuzu, baharatları, süzmüş olduğunuz kuş üzümlerini, salçaları, pirinci, ince kıyılmış yeşillikleri ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
9.  Hazırladığınız iç malzemeyi içini oyduğunuz lahananın içine doldurun.
10.  Kalan lahana yapraklarını üzerine kapak olacak şekilde veya tamamen kapatacak şekilde yerleştirin.
11.  Lahanayı büyük bir tencerenin içine ters çevirerek yerleştirin.
12.  Üzerine zeytinyağını gezdirin, 2 su bardağı su ekleyin.
13.  Önce yüksek ateşte 5 dakika pişirin.
14.  Daha sonra ateşi kısıp lahana iyice yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
15.  Servis tabağına çıkartarak sıcak servis yapın.

whole-suckling-pig-and-candied-fruit-arg.name: Whole Suckling Pig And Candied Fruit
whole-suckling-pig-and-candied-fruit-arg.original_name: Γουρουνάκι γάλακτος ολόκληρο και γλασαρισμένα φρούτα
instructions: Πλένουμε πρώτα καλά και στεγνώνουμε το κρέας.
Αν μπορούμε να βρούμε λεμονόφυλλα η νερατζόφυλλα είναι ιδανικά γι’ αυτή τη συνταγή.
Στρώνουμε τα φύλλα σε μεγάλο βαθύ ταψί.
Μπορούμε να βάλουμε και κλωνάρια δεντρολίβανου. Έτσι θα στάζουν τα λίπη αλλά το δέρμα εξωτερικά θα ξεροψήνεται.
Προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι στο γουρουνάκι στην κοιλιά του.
Προσθέτουμε κλαδάκια φρέσκων μυρωδικών.
Λιώνουμε τον κύβο στο γουδί.
Προσθέτουμε το λάδι, το μέλι και τη μουστάρδα και τα ανακατεύουμε.
Προσθέτουμε το χυμό λεμόνι-πορτοκάλι, αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Σπάμε με σφυρί τις πατάτες να σκάσουν ελαφρά.
Τις περιχύνουμε με τα υλικά.
Γεμίζουμε το γουρουνάκι. Αν θέλουμε ράβουμε την κοιλιά του.
Το αλείφουμε με τα υγρά που έχουν περισσέψει από τις πατάτες.
Ρίχνουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι εξωτερικά και το βάζουμε πάνω στα λεμονόφυλλα.
Το ψήνουμε για 4 ώρες στους 160ºC σε προθερμασμένο φούρνο. Κάθε τόσο το αλείφουμε με τα υγρά του ταψιού.
Δυναμώνουμε την θερμοκρασία στους 200ºC και το αφήνουμε να ξεροψηθεί η πέτσα και να γίνει τραγανή, για περίπου μισή ώρα.
Αφού ψηθεί το αφήνουμε για 20′ να μείνει και να ανακτήσει τα υγρά του.
Έπειτα το σερβίρουμε ολόκληρο στο τραπέζι η στον μπουφέ . Αν το αφήσετε να κρυώσει η πέτσα θα μαλακώσει.

whole-sweet-potatoes-roasted-in-air-frye.name: Whole Sweet Potatoes Roasted In Air Fryer
whole-sweet-potatoes-roasted-in-air-frye.original_name: Boniatos enteros asados en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 3 o 4 boniatos medianos (unos 250-300 g cada uno)

instructions: Lavamos bien los boniatos bajo el grifo, frotando la piel si tienen restos de tierra.
Los secamos con papel de cocina y los pinchamos varias veces con un tenedor.
Los colocamos en la cesta de la freidora de aire procurando que no se monten unos sobre otros. Rociamos con aceite en spray.
Cocinamos a 190 °C durante 45 minutos. Si son más grandes o la freidora va justa de espacio, puede que necesiten hasta 50 minutos. A mitad de cocción, les damos la vuelta para que se hagan por igual.
Sabremos que están listos si al pincharlos con un cuchillo fino este entra con facilidad. Dejamos reposar unos minutos antes de servirlos o usarlos para otra receta.

whole-tomatoes-in-jars-canning-steriliza.name: Whole Tomatoes In Jars / Canning & Sterilization
whole-tomatoes-in-jars-canning-steriliza.original_name: Oλόκληρες ντομάτες σε βάζα / Κονσερβοποίηση & Aποστείρωση
instructions: Πλένουμε τα βάζα με ζεστό νερό και σαπούνι.
Είτε τα βράζουμε για 15 λεπτά σε μέτρια φωτιά, είτε ανάβουμε το φούρνο στους 150°C στις αντιστάσεις, απλώνουμε μία πετσέτα στην σχάρα του φούρνου και τοποθετούμε τα βάζα και τα καπάκια.
Αφήνουμε να μείνουν μέσα στο φούρνο για 15 λεπτά. Τα βγάζουμε με προσοχή, γιατί καίνε πολύ και τα αφήνουμε να κρυώσουν.

whole-wheat-bagel-recipe-lezzet.name: Whole Wheat Bagel Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı un (gerekirse, yoğurma sırasında ayarlanabilir)
1 yemek kaşığı toz şeker veya bal
Yulaf unu veya çavdar unu (daha yoğun ve lifli bir doku için)
Glutensiz un karışımları (mısır unu + pirinç unu)
Beyaz un + tam buğday unu karışımı (daha hafif bir sonuç için)
Süt veya badem sütü (daha yumuşak ve aromatik bir hamur için)
Yoğurt veya ayran (hafif ekşi tat ve ekstra nem sağlar)
Taze maya (10 g = 1 paket instant maya)
Hamur mayasını doğal mayaya çevirmek istersen ekşi maya da kullanılabilir (fermentasyon süresi uzar)
Bal veya akçaağaç şurubu (hafif tatlı aroma için)
Ayçiçek yağı veya mısır yağı (nötr tat için)
Tuzlu veya baharatlı karışımlar (karabiber, kekik, kırmızı biber)

instructions: 1. Ilık suya şekeri ve mayayı ekleyip 5 dakika bekletin.
2. Unları ve tuzu bir kapta karıştırın.
3.  Maya karışımını ve zeytinyağını ekleyip yoğurun.
4.  Ele yapışmayan, yumuşak bir hamur elde edin.
5. Hamuru hafifçe unlanmış bir kaba alın, üzerini kapat��p 1 saat kadar mayalanmaya bırakın.
6.  Hamur iki katına çıkmalı.
7. Mayalanan hamuru 4-6 eşit parçaya bölün.
8. Her parçayı yuvarlayın ve ortasına parmakla delik açarak halka şekli verin.
9. Geniş bir tencerede su kaynatın.
10.  Her bageli 1-2 dakika kadar kaynar suda haşlayın.
11. Haşlanan bagelleri fırın tepsisine alın, üzerlerini susam veya başka tohumlarla süsleyin.
12. Önceden ısıtılmış 200 derece fırında 15-20 dakika altın rengi alana kadar pişirin ve servis edin.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

whole-wheat-banana-oat-muffins.name: Whole Wheat Banana Oat Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
Combine oats, whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, white sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a medium-sized bowl; set aside.
Lightly beat eggs in a large bowl. Stir in milk, oil, brown sugar, and vanilla extract. Add bananas and mix together well.
Add 1/2 of the flour mixture to egg mixture; stir to combine. Add remaining flour mixture and stir. Stir nuts into batter.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each 3/4 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean, 18 to 20 minutes.

whole-wheat-bread.name: Whole Wheat Bread
instructions: Mix warm water, yeast, and 1/3 cup honey in a large bowl to dissolve.
Add 5 cups bread flour, and stir to combine.
Let sit for 30 minutes, or until big and bubbly.
Mix in 3 tablespoons melted butter, remaining 1/3 cup honey, and salt. Stir in 2 cups whole wheat flour.
Transfer dough to a floured work surface and gradually knead in remaining 2 cups whole wheat flour.
Knead until dough starts to pull away from the work surface, adding more whole wheat flour if necessary; dough should be a bit tacky to the touch, but not too sticky.
Place in a greased bowl, turning once to coat the surface of the dough.
Cover with a dish towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled, 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Grease three 9x5-inch loaf pans. Punch down the dough, and divide it into 3 loaves.
Place in the prepared loaf pans, and allow to rise until dough has topped the pans by one inch, another 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Bake the risen loaves in the preheated oven until golden brown for 25 to 30 minutes, do not overbake.
Lightly brush the tops of the loaves with remaining 2 tablespoons melted butter when done to prevent crust from getting hard.
Cool completely. Enjoy!

whole-wheat-bread-crumbs.name: Whole Wheat Bread Crumbs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Layer bread slices in a single layer on ungreased baking sheets. Allow a bit of room between slices for warm air to circulate.
Toast bread in the preheated oven, flipping until evenly dry, 30 to 45 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool completely, 15 to 20 minutes.
Process bread in a food processor until fine. Add Pecorino Romano cheese, parsley, oregano, basil, garlic powder, onion powder, thyme, salt, and sugar and pulse until just combined.

whole-wheat-bread-sandwich-recipe-with-a.name: Whole Wheat Bread Sandwich Recipe With Avocado And Fresh Cheese
whole-wheat-bread-sandwich-recipe-with-a.original_name: Receta de Sándwich de pan integral con aguacate y queso fresco

ingredients.item: 4  rebanadas de pan integral con semillas o avena
1  taza de hojas verdes frescas (rúcula, berros o espinaca)
1  cucharada de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Sal y pimienta negra recién molida al gusto

instructions: Corta el aguacate en mitades, retira el hueso y tritura la pulpa con jugo de limón, sal y pimienta para evitar que se oxide.
Unta la mezcla de aguacate sobre dos rebanadas de pan integral.
Coloca encima láminas de aguacate extra si deseas más textura.
Añade el queso fresco desmenuzado de forma uniforme.
Incorpora los rábanos en rodajas y las hojas verdes frescas, lavadas y bien secas.
Rocía un poco de aceite de oliva y cierra con las rebanadas restantes.
Presiona ligeramente, corta en mitades y sirve.

whole-wheat-bread-with-honey-and-walnuts.name: Whole Wheat Bread With Honey And Walnuts
whole-wheat-bread-with-honey-and-walnuts.original_name: Ballı Ve Cevizli Tam Buğday Ekmeği
instructions: 1. Unları, tuzu, mayayı harmanlayın.
2.  Tereyağı, su ve balı ekleyin ve yoğurun.
3.  Gerekirse tam buğday unu ilavesi yapın.
4.  Ceviz içi ekleyin.
5.  Yuvarlak şekil verip yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye yerleştirin.
6.  Üzerini örterek 30 dakika bekletin.
7.  Üzerine yulaf ezmesi, susam, haşhaş, ay çekirdeği serpiştirip 190 derece fırında yaklaşık 35-40 dakika pişirin.
8.  Soğuduktan sonra dilimleyerek servis yapın.
9. Yeni tatlar keşfetmek için, aromalı tam buğday ekmeği tarifine göz atın.

whole-wheat-brownies.name: Whole Wheat Brownies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.

Place chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler over simmering water. Stir frequently, scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching, until chocolate is melted, about 5 minutes. Remove from the heat and set aside to cool for 5 minutes.

Combine sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and salt in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Stir in the cooled melted chocolate until incorporated. Fold in flour and then stir in chocolate chips and walnuts. Pour batter into the prepared baking pan and spread evenly.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is dry and edges have started to pull away from the sides of the pan, 25 to 28 minutes. Let cool completely before cutting into bars.

whole-wheat-buttermilk-pancakes.name: Whole Wheat Buttermilk Pancakes
instructions: Combine buttermilk, egg, and vegetable oil in a bowl. Mix in flours, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Stir in chocolate chips.

Spray a skillet with cooking spray and heat over medium heat. Working in batches, spoon or pour 1/4 cupfuls of batter onto the hot skillet. Cook until bubbles form and edges are dry, 2 to 3 minutes. Flip and cook until golden brown, about 2 minutes longer.

whole-wheat-chapati.name: Whole Wheat Chapati
instructions: Mix flour and salt together in a bowl. Stir in water to form a soft dough.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured work surface and knead several times. Divide into 8 pieces and roll each into a ball. Roll each ball into a very thin round using a rolling pin.
Heat a griddle over medium-high heat. Cook each dough round on griddle until dough bubbles and blisters appear, about 2 minutes. Flip and cook until lightly browned on the other side.

whole-wheat-chocolate-chip-cookies.name: Whole Wheat Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Beat butter, white sugar, and brown sugar with an electric mixer in a large bowl until smooth. Add eggs and vanilla extract; beat until light and fluffy. Add flour, baking soda, and salt and stir until dough just combined. Stir in chocolate chips and walnuts. Dough will be very crumbly. Press and compact dough using your hands and a spoon.
Roll dough into 36 (1 1/2-inch) balls and place on a baking sheet. Press down slightly to flatten.
Bake in the preheated oven for 8 to 12 minutes. Allow to cool before removing from the baking sheet.

whole-wheat-chocolate-coffee-cake.name: Whole Wheat Chocolate-coffee Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
Whisk whole wheat flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, cardamom, and salt together in a medium bowl.

Whisk brewed coffee and espresso powder together in a large bowl. Add Greek yogurt, applesauce, maple syrup, eggs, and vanilla extract; whish until thoroughly combined and no lumps remain. Stir in 1/2 of the dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Repeat with remaining dry ingredients. Fold in chocolate chips and walnuts. Pour batter into the prepared pan and place the pan onto a baking sheet.

Place both pans in the preheated oven and bake until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out with a few moist crumbs, 50 to 60 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 30 minutes. Gently run a table knife around the edges of the pan to loosen. Remove the sides of the pan and allow cake to cool completely, 15 to 30 minutes more.
Dust with powdered sugar before serving.

whole-wheat-coconut-oil-waffles.name: Whole Wheat Coconut Oil Waffles
instructions: Preheat a waffle iron according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl; make a well in the center.
Beat milk, coconut oil, egg, and vanilla extract together in another bowl. Pour into well in flour mixture; stir until batter is just combined.
Ladle batter onto the preheated waffle iron; cook until golden and crisp, 2 to 5 minutes.

whole-wheat-cookies-with-honey-and-cinna.name: Whole Wheat Cookies With Honey And Cinnamon

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı esmer toz şeker

instructions: 1. Şeker ve ayçiçeği yağını derin bir kapta 15 dakika karıştırın.
2.  Diğer malzemeleri de ilave edip yoğurun.
3.  Ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp elinizde yuvarlak şekillendirin.
4.  Yağlı kağıt serdiğiniz fırın tepsisine alıp 200 derece fırında 15 dakika pişirin.
5.  Fırından çıkarın.
6.  Ilınınca servis yapın.

whole-wheat-fit-spaghetti-lezzet.name: Whole Wheat Fit Spaghetti
instructions: 1. Makarnayı haşlayıp suyunu süzün.
2.  Sosu için yemeklik doğradığınız soğanı ve ezdiğiniz sarımsağı zeytinyağında pembeleşinceye kadar soteleyin.
3.  Ortadan ikiye kestiğiniz domatesler, rendelenmiş domates ve dilimlenmiş zeytini ilave edin.
4.  Tuz ve karabiberle tatlandırıp domatesler yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
5.  Suyunu süzdüğünüz makarnayı sos tenceresine alıp karıştırın.
6.  Üzerini küp doğradığınız keçi peyniri, fesleğen yaprakları ve çörekotuyla süsleyerek sıcak servis yapın.

whole-wheat-flatbread.name: Whole Wheat Flatbread
instructions: Whisk yeast, sugar, and ¾ cup warm water in a small bowl to blend. Let sit until yeast is foamy and sugar is dissolved, about 5 minutes.
Combine pastry flour, salt, and 1 cup all-purpose flour in a large bowl. Stir in yeast mixture with a wooden spoon, working until dough comes together into a shaggy ball.
Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead, adding flour as needed to prevent sticking, until smooth and stiff, about 5 minutes.
Oil a clean large bowl. Add dough and turn to coat. Cover with a clean kitchen towel and let stand in a warm, draft-free place until doubled in size, about 1½ hours.
Place a pizza stone or an inverted baking sheet on rack placed in bottom third of oven; preheat to 450°.

Divide dough into 4 pieces. Working with 1 piece of dough at a time, roll out on a lightly floured work surface as thin as possible into an oblong shape. Carefully transfer to pizza stone and bake until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool.
Do Ahead: Flatbread can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

whole-wheat-flour-bread-lezzet.name: Whole Wheat Flour Bread
instructions: 1. Yaş mayayı 1 su bardağı ılık sütte eritin.
2.  Su hariç tüm malzemeleri derin bir kaba ekleyip yoğurun.
3.  Elinize biraz yapışan bir hamur oluncaya kadar su ekleyin.
4.  Hamurun üzerine nemli bir bez örtüp 45 dakika mayalandırın.
5.  Mayalanan hamuru toparlayıp yuvarlak hale getirdikten sonra yağlı kağıt serdiğiniz tepsiye yerleştirin.
6.  Üzerine un serperek ılık bir ortamda yaklaşık 45-50 dakika mayalandırın.
7.  Mayalanan hamuru önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında 30-40 dakika pişirin.
8.  Tam buğday unlu ekmeği, sebze yemekleri ile birlikte servis ederek kilonuzu dengede tutabilirsiniz.
9.  Afiyet olsun.
10. Tam Buğday Unlu Ekmek Nasıl Kabartılır?Ekmeğin kabarmasını sağlamak için, yaş maya veya instant maya kullanabilirsiniz.
11.  Hamuru, yumuşak bir kıvama getirdikten sonra üzerini streç film veya nemli bir ebzle örterek mayalamaya bırakın.
12.  Mayalama işlemi ortalama 45 dakika ile 1 saat arası sürer.
13.  Hamur, iki katına geldiği zaman mayalama işlemi sonlanır.
14. Peki, özenle hazırlanan ve severek tüketilen tam buğday ekmeği faydalı mı? İçeriğindeki bileşenler sayesinde beyaz ekmeğe göre daha besleyici bir ekmektir.
15.  Vitamin ve mineral değerleri de oldukça yüksektir.
16.  Kan şekerini kontrolde tutan ve bağırsakların düzenli çalışmasını sağlayan tam buğday unlu ekmek sağlık açısından faydalıdır.
17. Siz de hazır besinler tüketmek yerine evde kendi ekmeğinizi hazırlamak istiyorsanız, pratik ekmek tariflerinden faydalanabilirsiniz.
18.  Yumuşacık kıvamıyla nefis bazlama yapımına veya Karadeniz usulü mısır ekmeği tarifine göz atmayı unutmayın.

whole-wheat-flour-cake-with-mixed-cheese.name: Whole Wheat Flour Cake With Mixed Cheese And Pepper
whole-wheat-flour-cake-with-mixed-cheese.original_name: Karışık Peynirli Ve Biberli Tam Buğday Unlu Kek
instructions: 1. Biberleri tavla zarı büyüklüğünde doğrayın.
2.  Tavaya 1 yemek kaşığı ayçiçeği yağı ekleyip biberleri hafif soteleyin.
3.  Derin bir kapta yumurtaları çırpın.
4.  Ayçiçeği yağı, yoğurt ve peynirleri ekleyip çırpmaya devam edin.
5.  Ilınan biberleri ekleyin.
6.  Tam buğday unu, kabartma tozu, tuz ve karabiberi ekleyip karıştırın.
7.  Son olarak ince kıydığınız yeşillikleri ekleyin.
8.  Yağladığınız fırın kabına malzemeyi aktarın.
9.  Önceden ısıtılmış 160 derece fırında 55-60 dakika pişirin.
10.  Soğuduktan sonra servis yapın.

whole-wheat-flour-multigrain-bread-recip.name: Whole Wheat Flour Multigrain Bread Recipe
whole-wheat-flour-multigrain-bread-recip.original_name: Tam Buğday Unlu Tahıllı Ekmek Tarifi

ingredients.item: 150 gr beyaz un (veya 100 gr ekmeklik un)

instructions: 1. Derin bir yoğurma kabına unları, tüm kuru tohumları (ay çekirdeği, kabak çekirdeği, keten tohumu), tuzu ve kuru mayayı alın ve güzelce karıştırın.
2.  Ayrı bir kapta ılık su, zeytinyağı ve balı karıştırarak sıvı karışımı hazırlayın.
3.  Bu sıvıyı kuru malzemelerin üzerine dökün.
4.  Tüm malzemeleri bir araya getirerek ele hafif yapışan, yumuşak ama toparlanmış bir hamur yoğurun.
5.  Stand mikserde 6-7 dakika, elde ise yaklaşık 10 dakika yoğurun.
6.  Hamuru unlanmış bir kaba alın, üzerini örtün ve ılık bir ortamda yaklaşık 1 saat mayalanmaya bırakın.
7.  Hacmi iki katına çıkmalı.
8.  Mayalanan hamuru hafif unlanmış tezgahta toparlayın.
9.  Dilerseniz baton kalıba yerleştirin veya serbest form vererek fırın tepsisine alın.
10.  Üzerini hafif nemli bir bezle örtüp 30 dakika daha mayalandırın.
11.  Bu sırada fırını alt-üst ayarda 220 dereceye ısıtın.
12.  Ekmeğin üzerine kalan tohumları serpiştirin.
13.  Fırının içine ısıya dayanıklı bir kapla su yerleştirerek buhar ortamı oluşturun.
14.  Ekmeği önce 220 derecede 10 dakika pişirin, ardından fırının ısısını 190 dereceye düşürerek 25-30 dakika daha pişirmeye devam edin.
15.  Pişen ekmeği fırından çıkarıp tel ızgara üzerine alın ve en az 1 saat dinlendirin.
16.  Soğuduktan sonra dilimleyip servis edin.

whole-wheat-flour-quiche-lezzet.name: Whole Wheat Flour Quiche
instructions: 1. Soğuk tereyağını küp şeklinde doğrayıp unla birlikte mutfak robotunda kum haline gelene dek karıştırın.
2. Zeytinyağını, süzme yoğurdu, yumurtaları, kabartma tozunu ve tuzu ekleyip yoğurun.
3.  Hamuru ikiye bölün.
4.  Un serpilmiş tezgahın üzerinde bir parçasını merdane yardımı ile yarım santimden biraz daha ince olacak şekilde açın.
5.  Küçük yuvarlak kalıp yardımı ile hamurdan yuvarlak parçalar kesin.
6.  Hamurları yağlanmış muffin kapların içine paylaştırın ve buzdolabında bekletin.
7. İç malzemesi için; zeytinyağını tavada ısıtıp kabuğunu soyduğunuz arpacık soğanları yumuşayana kadar kavurun.
8.  Rendelenmiş havucu ve irice doğradığınız ıspanakları da sırasıyla ekleyerek kavurmaya devam edin.
9.  İç malzemeyi ocaktan alın.
10.  Soğuyunca tart hamurlarının içine paylaştırın.
11. Ayrı bir kapta yumurtaları çırpın.
12.  Muskatı, kimyonu ve ufalanmış peyniri ekleyip karıştırın.
13.  En son yumurtalı karışımı dökün.
14.  Önceden ısıtılmış 190 derece fırında kızarana kadar pişirin.

whole-wheat-flour-ramadan-pita-recipe-le.name: Whole Wheat Flour Ramadan Pita Recipe
whole-wheat-flour-ramadan-pita-recipe-le.original_name: Tam Buğday Unlu Ramazan Pidesi Tarifi
instructions: 1. Geniş bir kapta beyaz un, tam buğday unu, toz maya ve şekeri karıştırın.
2. Süt ve soğuk suyu ekleyerek yoğurmaya başlayın.
3. Hamur toparlanmaya başladığında tuz ve zeytinyağını ilave edin.
4. Ele hafif yapışan, yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
5. Hamurun üzerini örtüp ılık bir ortamda 40–45 dakika mayalanmaya bırakın.
6. Mayalanan hamuru hafifçe yoğurup yağlı kâğıt serili fırın tepsisine alın.
7. Elinizle pide şeklini verin, parmak uçlarınızla klasik pide desenini oluşturun.
8. Üzerine yumurta sarısını sürün, susam ve çörek otu serpin.
9. Önceden ısıtılmış 200°C fırında, üzeri kızarana kadar yaklaşık 18–22 dakika pişirin.
10. Fırından çıkan tam buğday unlu ramazan pidesi servise hazır.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

whole-wheat-flower-pastry-lezzet.name: Whole Wheat Flower Pastry

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağı rendelenmiş light beyaz peynir
Yarım çay bardağı ince kıyılmış dereotu

instructions: 1. Hamuru için gerekli olan tüm malzemeyi geniş bir yoğurma kabına alın.
2.  Kulak memesi kıvamında bir hamur elde edecek şekilde yoğurun.
3.  İç harcı için kurutulmuş domatesi ince doğrayıp bir kaseye alın.
4.  Rendelenmiş light beyaz peynir, ince kıyılmış dereotu ve zeytinyağını ilave edip karıştırın.
5.  Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar kopartıp merdane yardımıyla ince açın.
6.  Yuvarlak bir kurabiye kalıbıyla parçalar kesin.
7.  Kalan hamur parçalarından fındık büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp yuvarlayın ve kestiğiniz yuvarlak hamurların kenarına dizin.
8.  Ortalarına iç harcından doldurup yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
9.  Üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürüp önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında 20-25 dakika pişirin.
10.  Sıcak ya da ılık servis yapın.
11. Dilerseniz, çiçek poğaça tarifine de göz atabilirsiniz.

whole-wheat-huckleberry-crumb-muffins.name: Whole Wheat Huckleberry Crumb Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray 1 muffin tin with cooking spray.
Combine milk, sugar, butter, egg, and vanilla extract in a bowl; mix until completely combined.

Whisk all-purpose flour, 1/2 cup plus 1 tablespoon whole wheat flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl; fold into the milk mixture until batter is just combined. Fold in huckleberries to distribute them evenly.
Pour batter into the greased muffin tin.
Combine the remaining 1/4 cup whole wheat flour, oats, brown sugar, cold butter, and cinnamon in a bowl. Mix until crumbly and sprinkle over the muffins.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 15 minutes.

whole-wheat-orecchiette-with-bitter-gree.name: Whole Wheat Orecchiette With Bitter Greens And Radishes

ingredients.item: Coarse fresh breadcrumbs made from whole wheat bread

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add breadcrumbs and toast, stirring frequently, until golden and crisp, 4–5 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl; stir in lemon zest and red pepper flakes. Set aside.
Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until tender but still firm to the bite. Drain, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, heat 1 Tbsp. oil and butter in a large deep skillet over medium-high heat. Add radishes; cook, stirring often, until browned in spots but still crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl. Add remaining 2 Tbsp. oil and garlic to skillet; stir until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Add greens and 1 cup pasta cooking liquid and cook, stirring often, until greens start to wilt. Add pasta and cheese; stir until cheese melts and sauce is slightly thickened, adding more pasta cooking liquid by ¼ cup-fuls if too dry. Stir in radishes, lemon juice, and pepper. Season with salt. Sprinkle with breadcrumb mixture.

whole-wheat-pancake-mix.name: Whole Wheat Pancake Mix
instructions: Whisk whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl; store in an airtight container.

whole-wheat-pancakes-from-scratch.name: Whole Wheat Pancakes From Scratch
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Spread wheat germ over a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until toasted, about 5 minutes. Cool slightly, then transfer wheat germ to a large bowl.
Stir flour, baking soda, and salt into wheat germ. Beat buttermilk, eggs, and oil in another bowl until smooth; pour egg mixture into flour mixture and stir until batter is just blended.

Heat griddle over medium-high heat and coat with cooking spray. Pour 1/4 cup portions of batter onto the griddle and cook until bubbles form and the edges are dry, about 2 minutes. Flip and cook until browned on the other side, about 3 minutes more. Repeat with remaining batter.

whole-wheat-pasta-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Whole Wheat Pasta In The Oven
instructions: Χρειαζόμαστε σπιτική σάλτσα ντομάτας .
Προθερμαίνουμε πρώτα το φούρνο στους 180ºC.
Λαδώνουμε ένα πυρίμαχο σκεύος.
Βράζουμε τα ζυμαρικά ολικής σε αλατισμένο νερό, τα στραγγίζουμε και τα ξαναβάζουμε στην κατσαρόλα.
Προσθέτουμε τη μισή από τη σάλτσα ντομάτας και ανακατεύουμε.
Ζεσταίνουμε το λάδι σε τηγάνι και σοτάρουμε το κρεμμύδι, τις πιπεριές, το σκόρδο και τα μανιτάρια.
Προσθέτουμε τα λουκάνικα ψιλοκομμένα και τα μυρωδικά και προσθέτουμε αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Βάζουμε τα μισά ζυμαρικά στο ταψί και αδειάζουμε τη γέμιση.
Σκεπάζουμε με τα υπόλοιπα ζυμαρικά.
Κάνουμε μια στρώση τα κολοκυθάκια σε πολύ λεπτές φέτες και το καρότο.
Τρίβουμε τα τυριά και τα κάνουμε στρώση στην επιφάνεια του φαγητού μας.
Περιχύνουμε με την υπόλοιπη σάλτσα ντομάτας το φαγητό μας.
Ψήνουμε για 20′ λεπτά με σκεπασμένο το ταψί.
Ξεσκεπάζουμε και συνεχίζουμε το ψήσιμο για ακόμα 10′ λεπτά, μέχρι να ροδίσει.
Τα σερβίρετε ζεστά με σαλάτα εποχής και έχετε ένα απολαυστικό γεύμα γρήγορα και οικονομικά!

whole-wheat-pasta-recipe-with-mushrooms-.name: Whole Wheat Pasta Recipe With Mushrooms And Vegetables
whole-wheat-pasta-recipe-with-mushrooms-.original_name: Receta de pasta integral con hongos y verduras

ingredients.item: 160 g de pasta integral (fusilli o similar)
2  cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Hojas de albahaca fresca para servir

instructions: Pon a hervir abundante agua con sal. Cocina la pasta integral según las indicaciones del paquete hasta que esté al dente. Escúrrela y reserva un poco del agua de cocción.

Mientras tanto, lava y corta todas las verduras: los champiñones en láminas, el calabacín en medias lunas finas, la zanahoria en rodajas, el pimiento en trozos medianos, las judías verdes en segmentos de unos 3 cm y la cebolla morada en tiras finas.
Calienta el aceite de oliva en una sartén grande a fuego medio. Añade el ajo picado y la cebolla. Sofríe 2 minutos hasta que se ablanden.
Incorpora primero la zanahoria y las judías verdes, que tardan más en cocinarse. Saltea 4-5 minutos, removiendo ocasionalmente.

Añade luego los champiñones, el calabacín y el pimiento rojo. Cocina todo junto unos 6-7 minutos más, hasta que las verduras estén tiernas pero con algo de firmeza. Salpimienta al gusto y añade una pizca de hierbas secas.
Incorpora la pasta cocida a la sartén. Si está muy seca, añade una o dos cucharadas del agua de cocción reservada. Mezcla bien para que se integren los sabores.
Sirve caliente, con hojas de albahaca fresca por encima y un chorrito de aceite de oliva en crudo si lo deseas.

whole-wheat-pasta-salad-recipe-lezzet.name: Whole Wheat Pasta Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: 250 g tam buğday makarna (spiral, penne veya fusilli tercih edebilirsiniz)
100 gr beyaz peynir veya lor peyniri, küp doğranmış
1 yemek kaşığı limon suyu veya sirke

instructions: 1. Makarnayı tuzlu kaynar suda al dente kıvamında haşlayın, süzün ve soğuk sudan geçirip süzün.
2. Sebzeleri, peynir ve zeytini bir salata kasesine alın.
3. Soğuyan makarnayı ekleyin ve malzemeleri nazikçe karıştırın.
4. Zeytinyağı, limon suyu, tuz ve karabiber ile soslayın.
5. İsteğe bağlı olarak taze fesleğen veya maydanozla süsleyin.
6. 10–15 dakika buzdolabında dinlendirin ve servis edin.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

whole-wheat-pasta-with-chicken-and-brocc.name: Whole Wheat Pasta With Chicken And Broccoli Step By Step
whole-wheat-pasta-with-chicken-and-brocc.original_name: Pasta integral con pollo y brócoli paso a paso

ingredients.item: 160 g de pasta integral (penne, rigatoni o similar)
150 ml de leche semidesnatada o vegetal sin azúcar
1  cucharada de harina de avena o integral
1  cucharada de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: Corta la pechuga de pollo en dados medianos. Salpimiéntalos. Cocina en una sartén con un chorrito de aceite hasta que estén dorados y cocidos por dentro. Retira y reserva.
En la misma sartén, añade un poco más de aceite y sofríe la cebolla picada muy fina durante 3-4 minutos. Añade el ajo y cocina un minuto más.
Incorpora la cucharada de harina y remueve durante 30 segundos. Luego añade poco a poco la leche mientras sigues removiendo para evitar grumos. Cocina hasta que la mezcla espese ligeramente.
Añade la mostaza (si usas), las hierbas secas, sal y pimienta al gusto. Vuelve a incorporar el pollo a la sartén y cocina todo junto 3 minutos más.
Mientras tanto, cuece la pasta integral en abundante agua con sal. En los últimos 3 minutos de cocción, añade el brócoli a la misma olla para cocerlo junto con la pasta.
Escurre todo, reserva un poco del agua de cocción y añade la pasta y el brócoli a la sartén con la salsa. Mezcla con suavidad. Si está muy espesa, añade un poco del agua reservada.
Sirve caliente, con pimienta recién molida por encima y, si quieres, un hilo de aceite de oliva crudo al final.

whole-wheat-pasta-with-peas-and-pesto-sa.name: Whole Wheat Pasta With Peas And Pesto Sauce

ingredients.item: Yarım çay bardağı rendelenmiş parmesan peyniri

instructions: 1. Pesto sos için dolmalık fıstıkları tavada hafif kavurup soğumaya bırakın.
2.  Fesleğen, sarımsak, peynir, tuz, fıstık ve zeytinyağının yarısını derin bir kaseye alıp püre haline getirin.
3.  Kalan zeytinyağını azar azar ekleyip karıştırın.
4.  Makarnayı kaynayan tuzlu suya atarak yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
5.  Suyunu süzün.
6.  1 yemek kaşığı zeytinyağı ile bezelyeyi soteleyin.
7.  Makarna ve pesto sosu ekleyerek iyice karıştırın.
8.  Tencerenin kapağını kapatarak birkaç dakika bekletip servis tabağına alın.
9.  Üzerine parmesan peyniri serpiştirin.
10.  Kavrulmuş dolmalık fıstık ve fesleğen yaprakları ile süsleyerek servis yapın.

whole-wheat-peanut-butter-pancakes-with-.name: Whole Wheat Peanut Butter Pancakes With Chocolate Chips
instructions: Preheat a griddle to medium-low heat according to manufacturer's instructions.
Mix or sift flour, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl. Stir in chocolate chips.

Beat eggs together in a medium bowl. Add bananas to the bowl and mash. Add milk, peanut butter, syrup, and vanilla; stir until well mixed. Pour into the dry ingredients and stir just to incorporate, being careful not to overmix.
